Your code will be more robust, making broken links a thing of the past.\n&#96;typesafe-routes&#96;features include:\n* Autocompletion for paths and parameters\n* Path \u0026amp; template rendering\n* Nested, absolute, and relative path rendering\n* Parameter parsing and serialization\n* Type-safe, customizable, and extendable\n* Compatible with JavaScript (apart from type safety)\n* Small bundle size starting at less than 1kb\n## Example\n[](#example)\n[typescript playground](https://www.typescriptlang.org/play/?#-HEfi47goAHM4Dw4yAtTBqnCtQj+YLIqj-fruCapWaZX85U0FflNsqGRntYj+DnhU882K1Ziy5alPtnUCbJxuN62DMoBgQNyBzxs3qW+LEJK6KlFAAWPFBzsVqlY4uryTmSe8XVCjQFtFz61KgCcl9VixJm-npuve8BTSEYFExDg5nfn7QTZPWc1XvGxKxtZ4dlvdUfzQEQxAAtF8yAtwQPJK0lReXYexguDsAQ09W32VDKx7IA)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nimport{createRoutes,int,renderPath,parsePath,template}from\"typesafe-routes\";// route tree definitionconstroutes=createRoutes({users:{path:[\"users\",int(\"uid\")],// /users/:uidchildren:{edit:{path:[\"edit\"]},// /users/:uid/editdelete:{path:[\"delete\"]},// /users/:uid/delete}}});// absolute pathsrenderPath(routes.users,{uid:123});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"/users/123\"// nested pathsrenderPath(routes.users.edit,{uid:123});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"/users/123/edit\"renderPath(routes.users.delete,{uid:123});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"/users/123/delete\"// relative paths (\"\\_\" indicates the starting segment)renderPath(routes.\\_.users,{uid:123});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"users/123\"renderPath(routes.users.\\_.edit,{});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"edit\"// parse path paramsparsePath(routes.users.edit,{uid:\"42\"});// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; { uid: 42 }parsePath(routes.users.edit,\"/users/99/edit\");// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; { uid: 99 }// templatestemplate(routes.users.edit);// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"/users/:uid/edit\"template(routes.\\_.users.edit);// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"users/:uid/edit\"template(routes.users.\\_.edit);// \\~\u0026gt;\u0026gt; \"edit\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## Quick Reference\n[](#quick-reference)\nThe complete[documentation can be found here](https://kruschid.github.io/typesafe-routes).\n* Functions\n* &#96;renderPath&#96;: renders a path with parameters\n* &#96;renderQuery&#96;: renders a search query\n* &#96;render&#96;: renders a path with parameters including query string\n* &#96;template&#96;: renders a route template\n* &#96;parsePath&#96;: parses dynamic segments in a path\n* &#96;parseQuery&#96;: parses parameters in a search query\n* &#96;parse&#96;: parses path and search query for parameters\n* &#96;replace&#96;: partially replaces dynamic segments and query params in a string-based path (i.e.&#96;location.path&#96;)\n## Installation\n[](#installation)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nnpm i typesafe-routes#or any npm alternative\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n## How to Contribute\n[](#how-to-contribute)\n* leave a star ⭐* report a bug 🐞* open a pull request 🏗️* please discuss your idea on github or discord**before you start working on your PR**\n* help others ❤️* [buy me a coffee ☕](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kruschid)\n[![Buy Me A Coffee](https://cdn.buymeacoffee.com/buttons/v2/default-orange.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kruschid)\n## Roadmap\n[](#roadmap)\n* v10-v12 migration guide\n* v12beta-v12.1 migration guide\n* check for duplicate param names in the route tree\n* customizable parsing of search params (for example with qs)\n* demos \u0026amp; _**Agent (default)**_

You have a few options to fix this:

## Option 1: Upgrade `typesafe-routes` (Recommended)

The latest version is **12.3.0** which supports modern TypeScript. Since you're on v9, there are likely some API changes, but it's the cleanest solution:

```bash
npm install typesafe-routes@latest
```

Note: This is a major version upgrade (9 → 12), so you may need to update your code. Check the [migration guide](https://kruschid.github.io/typesafe-routes) for any breaking changes.

## Option 2: Use `--legacy-peer-deps` (Quick Workaround)

If you want to proceed without changing the package version:

```bash
npm install --legacy-peer-deps
```

This tells npm to ignore peer dependency conflicts. The package may still work since TypeScript 5.x is largely backwards compatible, but it's not guaranteed.

## Option 3: Add to `.npmrc` (Persistent Workaround)

To make the legacy peer deps behavior permanent, create or edit `.npmrc` in your project root:

```
legacy-peer-deps=true
```

---

**My recommendation**: Go with **Option 1** (upgrade to latest). The package is actively maintained and the newer version will have better compatibility with your modern TypeScript 5.9.3 setup. Would you like me to help you upgrade?

_**Agent (default)**_

Based on your usage, here are the best alternatives:

## Option 1: **Upgrade to typesafe-routes v12** (Easiest)

Your usage is simple enough that upgrading should be straightforward. The v12 API is similar but uses different function names:

```typescript
// v9 (current)
import { route, intParser } from "typesafe-routes";
const editFormRoute = route(":id/edit", { id: intParser }, {});

// v12 (new)
import { createRoutes, int } from "typesafe-routes";
const routes = createRoutes({
  edit: { path: [":id", "edit"], params: { id: int } }
});
```

---

## Option 2: **react-router-typesafe-routes** (Best for React Router 6+)

Specifically designed for React Router. Requires TypeScript 5.0+ and has Zod integration.

```bash
npm install react-router-typesafe-routes
```

---

## Option 3: **No library — use React Router's built-in helpers**

Since your usage is simple, you could replace it with plain TypeScript:

```typescript
// Simple typed route builders without dependencies
export const editFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/edit`;
export const viewFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/view`;
export const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModule) => `/${moduleName}`;
```

React Router 6's `useParams()` can be typed with generics, and you can use Zod for parsing if needed.

---

## My Recommendation

Given your simple usage (mostly just building URL strings with typed params), I'd suggest:

1. **First choice**: Upgrade `typesafe-routes` to v12 — minimal code changes
2. **Second choice**: Remove it entirely and use plain TypeScript helper functions — you're not using many advanced features

Would you like me to help you with either approach?

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the full picture. The usage is straightforward:

1. `useRouteParams(route)` - to get typed params from the URL
2. Route definitions with `route()` function and parsers
3. Helper functions like `getViewFormRoute(id)` that return path strings

The main hook used is `useRouteParams` which is imported from `typesafe-routes`. This can easily be replaced with React Router's `useParams()` hook.

Let me provide a migration plan to replace this with plain TypeScript + React Router's built-in `useParams`.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Now I have a complete picture. Your usage is simple and can be easily replaced with **React Router's built-in `useParams()` hook** + plain TypeScript helpers. Here's the migration plan:

## Migration Summary

You're using `typesafe-routes` for two things:
1. **`useRouteParams(route)`** → Replace with React Router's `useParams<T>()`
2. **Route path builders** (`getViewFormRoute`, `getEditFormRoute`, etc.) → Replace with simple TypeScript functions

## Files to Update

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/lib/router/index.ts` | Remove typesafe-routes, keep simple helpers |
| `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |
| `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` | Use `useParams()` |

## New Router Code

The new `src/lib/router/index.ts` would look like:

```typescript
// No external dependencies needed

export const enum CoreModule {
  dashboard = "dashboard",
  contacts = "contacts",
  // ... same as before
}

// Simple type-safe route builders
export const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModule) => `/${moduleName}`;
export const getEditFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/edit`;
export const getViewFormRoute = (id: number) => `${id}/view`;
export const getAddFormRoute = () => "add";
export const getImportFormRoute = () => "import";

export const rootRoute = "/";
export const defaultModuleRoute = "/content";

// Type for useParams - use with React Router's useParams<RouteParams>()
export interface ModuleRouteParams {
  moduleName: CoreModule;
}

export interface IdRouteParams {
  id: string; // useParams always returns strings
}
```

## Component Usage

```typescript
// Before (typesafe-routes)
import { useRouteParams } from "typesafe-routes";
import { editFormRoute } from "@lib/router";
const { id } = useRouteParams(editFormRoute);

// After (React Router native)
import { useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { IdRouteParams } from "@lib/router";
const { id } = useParams<IdRouteParams>();
const numericId = Number(id); // Parse to number when needed
```

---

Would you like me to implement this migration? It will:
1. Remove the `typesafe-routes` dependency
2. Update `src/lib/router/index.ts` with plain TypeScript
3. Update all 10 files to use React Router's native `useParams()`

---

_**Agent (default)**_

Migration complete. No linter errors. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Summary

**Removed `typesafe-routes` dependency** and replaced with React Router's native `useParams()` hook.

### Files Updated (10 files):

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `src/lib/router/index.ts` | Removed all typesafe-routes imports; kept simple route builder functions |
| `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` | `useRouteParams(coreModuleRoute)` → `useParams<{ moduleName: string }>()` |
| `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` | `useRouteParams(viewFormRoute)` → `useParams<{ id: string }>()` + `Number(idParam)` |
| `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` | Same pattern |
| `package.json` | Removed `typesafe-routes` from dependencies |

### Next Steps

Run `npm install` to update your `node_modules` and remove the old dependency:

```bash
npm install
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I see the issue now. Looking at `app.tsx`, the routes are defined like this:

```tsx
<Routes>
  <Route path="/auth/*" element={<Auth />} />
  <Route
    path={rootRoute}  // This is "/"
    element={<AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs>...</AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs>}
  >
    <Route path={rootRoute} element={<ModuleLoader />} />  // This is also "/"
    <Route
      path={`${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard)}/*`}  // This is "/dashboard/*"
      element={<ModuleLoader />}
    />
  </Route>
</Routes>
```

The problem is that:
1. Only `/dashboard/*` route is defined
2. There's no route for `/:moduleName/*` to catch all other modules like `/content`

The original code probably had a dynamic route that matched all modules. I need to add a catch-all route for `/:moduleName/*`.

Let me check what `getCoreModuleRoute` returns and fix the routes.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

I found the issue. The `app.tsx` only has a route defined for `/dashboard/*`, but not for other modules like `/content`. The router needs a dynamic route pattern `/:moduleName/*` to match all modules.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The indentation looks off but the logic is correct now. The route `/:moduleName/*` will now match `/content`, `/contacts`, `/orders`, etc.

The fix is complete. The issue was that `app.tsx` only had a route for `/dashboard/*` but no catch-all route for other modules. Now with `/:moduleName/*`, all module routes will be matched.

Let me verify the fix is correct by summarizing what was changed.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Fixed. The issue was that `app.tsx` only had a specific route for `/dashboard/*`, but no dynamic route to match other modules like `/content`, `/contacts`, etc.

I changed:

```tsx
// Before - only matched /dashboard/*
path={`${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard)}/*`}

// After - matches any /:moduleName/* (e.g., /content/*, /contacts/*, etc.)
path="/:moduleName/*"
```

Now when you navigate to `/content`, the `/:moduleName/*` route will match, and `useParams()` will return `{ moduleName: "content" }`, which will render the `ContentModule`.

Refresh your browser to test the fix.

            "text": "} from \"lib/router\";"

            "lineNumber": 19
          },

            "lineNumber": 30
          },

            "lineNumber": 38
          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const DataManagementBlock = ({\n  header,\n  description,\n  itemId,\n  entity,\n  successNavigationRoute,\n  handleDeleteAsync,\n  showEditButton = true,\n  showOnlyButtons = false,\n  onDeleted,\n}: DataDeleteProps) =\u003e {\n  const { notificationsService } = useNotificationsService();\n  const { Show: showErrorModal } = useErrorDetailsModal();\n  const handleNavigation = useCoreModuleNavigation();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const { moduleName } = useParams\u003c{ moduleName: string }\u003e();\n\n  const [openConfirmation, setOpenConfirmation] = useState(false);\n  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);\n  const [isConfirmed, setIsConfirmed] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isConfirmed) {\n      (async () =\u003e {\n        await execDeleteWithToast(deleteRecord, notificationsService, entity, showErrorModal);\n      })();\n    }\n  }, [isConfirmed]);\n\n  const handleDelete = () =\u003e {\n    setOpenConfirmation(true);\n  };\n\n  const deleteRecord = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setIsDeleting(true);\n      await handleDeleteAsync(itemId);\n      if (onDeleted) {\n        onDeleted();\n      }\n      handleNavigation(successNavigationRoute);\n    } catch (error) {\n      setIsDeleting(false);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const editRecord = async () =\u003e {\n    navigate(&#96;/${moduleName}/${itemId}/edit&#96;);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      {showOnlyButtons ?\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ModuleLoader = () =\u003e {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams\u003c{ moduleName: string }\u003e();\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n      \u003cErrorBoundary FallbackComponent={ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage} resetKeys={[moduleName]}\u003e\n        \u003cSuspense fallback=\"Loading...\"\u003e\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.content \u0026\u0026 \u003cContentModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.contacts \u0026\u0026 \u003cContactsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.unsubscribes \u0026\u0026 \u003cUnsubscribesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.links \u0026\u0026 \u003cLinksModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.comments \u0026\u0026 \u003cCommentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.accounts \u0026\u0026 \u003cAccountsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.orders \u0026\u0026 \u003cOrdersModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.domains \u0026\u0026 \u003cDomainsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.segments \u0026\u0026 \u003cSegmentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.users \u0026\u0026 \u003cUserModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.about \u0026\u0026 \u003cAboutModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.emailTemplates \u0026\u0026 \u003cEmailTemplatesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.activityLogs \u0026\u0026 \u003cActivityLogModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.dashboard \u0026\u0026 \u003cDashboardModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.media \u0026\u0026 \u003cMediaModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.settings \u0026\u0026 \u003cSettingsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.tasks \u0026\u0026 \u003cTasksModule /\u003e}\n          {!moduleName \u0026\u0026 \u003cNavigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /\u003e}\n        \u003c/Suspense\u003e\n      \u003c/ErrorBoundary\u003e\n    \u003c/ModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n  );\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const AccountViewBase = () =\u003e {\n  const { state } = useLocation();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const params = useParams();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState(\"details\");\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState\u003cAccountDetailsDto | null\u003e(\n    (state as AccountDetailsDto) || null\n  );\n  const didFetchRef = useRef(false);\n\n  const accountIdFromRoute = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n  const accountId = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (Number.isFinite(accountIdFromRoute)) return accountIdFromRoute as number;\n    if (account?.id \u0026\u0026 Number.isFinite(account.id)) return account.id;\n    return undefined;\n  }, [account?.id, accountIdFromRoute]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const load = async () =\u003e {\n      if (account || didFetchRef.current) return;\n      const id = params.id ? Number(params.id) : undefined;\n      if (!id) return;\n      try {\n        // First, try cache to avoid duplicate fetches across remounts\n        const cached = accountDetailsCache.get(id);\n        if (cached) {\n          setAccount(cached);\n          return;\n        }\n        didFetchRef.current = true;\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        accountDetailsCache.set(id, data);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        // noop; fall back to minimal header\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    };\n    load();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [params.id]);\n\n  const handleChange = (event: React.SyntheticEvent, newValue: string) =\u003e {\n    setTabValue(newValue);\n    navigate(newValue, { state: account ?? state });\n  };\n\n  const accountName = account?.name || \"View Account\";\n\n  const actionButtons = accountId ? (\n    \u003cDataManagementBlock\n;\n;",

        "contents": "// Simple type-safe route builders\nexport const getCoreModuleRoute = (moduleName: CoreModuleType) =\u003e &#96;/${moduleName}&#96;;\n\nexport const getEditFormRoute = (id: number) =\u003e &#96;${id}/edit&#96;;",

const location = useLocation();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const userInfo = useUserInfo();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { selectedLanguage } = useGlobalLanguageFilter();\n  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Set full width layout for content editor\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setFullWidth(true);\n    return () =\u003e {\n      setFullWidth(false);\n    };\n  }, [setFullWidth]);\n\n  // Route parameters\n  const {\n    id,\n    sourceId: routeSourceId,\n    targetLanguage: routeTargetLanguage,\n    type: routeType,\n  } = const translateToParam = routeTargetLanguage || searchParams.get(\"translateTo\");\n  const translationTypeParam =\n    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);\n\n  // Determine operation modes\n  const aiGeneratedContent = location.state?.aiGeneratedContent;\n  const isAIDraftRoute = location.pathname.includes(\"/ai-draft\");\n  const isAIDraftMode = !!aiGeneratedContent || isAIDraftRoute;\n  const isDuplicateMode = !!sourceId \u0026\u0026 !translateToParam;\n  const isTranslationMode = !!translateToParam;\n  const isCreateMode = !id \u0026\u0026 !isDuplicateMode \u0026\u0026 !isTranslationMode \u0026\u0026 !isAIDraftMode;\n\n  // UI state\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"content\");\n  const [restoreDataState, setRestoreDataState] = useState\u003cContentEditRestoreState\u003e(\n    ContentEditRestoreState.Idle\n  );\n  const [storedMetadataCollapsed, setStoredMetadataCollapsed] = [translateDialogOpen, setTranslateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContentEdit } from \"./content-edit\";\n\nexport const ContentModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003cRoutes\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/\"} element={\u003cContentList /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/new\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/ai-draft\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/duplicate\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage/:type\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n    \u003c/Routes\u003e\n  );\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const DomainsModule = \nconst viewFormProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n() =\u003e {\n\n    },\n  };\n\n  const editFormProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"update\",\n    editable: true,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e {\n      const params = useParams();\n      return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n    },\n    onSaved: () =\u003e {\n      navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.domains));\n    },\n  };\n\n  const createFormProps: GenericFormProps\u003cDomainDetailsDto, DomainCreateDto, DomainUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    ...formProps,\n    mode: \"create\",\n    editable: true,\n    onSaved: () =\u003e {\n      navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.domains));\n    },\n  };\n\n  const domainCreateForm = createFormProps \u0026\u0026 DomainForm(\"create\", \"Create\", createFormProps);\n  const domainEditForm = editFormProps \u0026\u0026 DomainForm(\"edit\", \"Edit\", editFormProps);\n  const domainViewForm = viewFormProps \u0026\u0026 DomainForm(\"view\", \"View\", viewFormProps);\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={\u003cDomainsLazy /\u003e} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={editFormRoute.template} element={domainEditForm} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={viewFormRoute.template} element={domainViewForm} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={addFormRoute.template} element={domainCreateForm} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  GenericDataGridProps,\n  GenericFormProps,\n  GenericModule,\n  getSchemaDto,\n} from \"@components/generic-components\";\nimport { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getEditFormRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"@lib/router\";\nimport { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nimport swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { LinkCreateDto, LinkDetailsDto, LinkUpdateDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\n\nexport const LinksModule = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const formProps: GenericFormProps\u003cLinkDetailsDto, LinkCreateDto, LinkUpdateDto\u003e = {\n    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    updateSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkUpdateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    createSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkCreateDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    editable: false,\n    getItemFn: client.api.linksDetail,\n    updateItemFn: client.api.linksPartialUpdate,\n    createItemFn: client.api.linksCreate,\n    getItemId: () =\u003e undefined,\n  };\n\n  const tableProps: GenericDataGridProps\u003cLinkDetailsDto\u003e = {\n    key: \"links-table\",\n    initiallyShownColumns: [\"name\", \"source\", \"destination\"],\n    schema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n    getItemsFn: client.api.linksList,\n    detailsNavigate: (item) =\u003e {\n      item.id \u0026\u0026 navigate(getViewFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n    editNavigate: (item) =\u003e {\n      item.id \u0026\u0026 navigate(getEditFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });\n    },\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity: \"link\",\n    listRoute: CoreModule.links,\n    deleteItemFn: client.api.linksDelete,\n  };\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Links\",\n;\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  GenericDataGridProps,"
          },

            "text": "  GenericFormProps,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "  GenericModule,"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "} from \"@components/generic-components\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getEditFormRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"@lib/router\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "import swaggerJson from \"@lib/network/swagger.json\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "import { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "import { LinkCreateDto, LinkDetailsDto, LinkUpdateDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "export const LinksModule = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  const { client } = useRequestContext();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  const navigate = useNavigate();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  const formProps: GenericFormProps\u003cLinkDetailsDto, LinkCreateDto, LinkUpdateDto\u003e = {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    detailsSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,

          {
            "lineNumber": 21,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    getItemFn: client.api.linksDetail,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    updateItemFn: client.api.linksPartialUpdate,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    createItemFn: client.api.linksCreate,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    getItemId: () =\u003e undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  const tableProps: GenericDataGridProps\u003cLinkDetailsDto\u003e = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    key: \"links-table\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    initiallyShownColumns: [\"name\", \"source\", \"destination\"],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    schema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkDetailsDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    getItemsFn: client.api.linksList,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    detailsNavigate: (item) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      item.id \u0026\u0026 navigate(getViewFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    editNavigate: (item) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      item.id \u0026\u0026 navigate(getEditFormRoute(item.id), { state: item });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  const deleteProps = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    header: \"Data Management\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    entity: \"link\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    listRoute: CoreModule.links,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    deleteItemFn: client.api.linksDelete,"
          },

            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  const module = GenericModule({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    moduleName: \"Links\","

            "lineNumber": 98,

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const LinksModule = \n\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Links\",\n    modulePath: CoreModule.links,\n    addButtonContent: \"Add link\",\n    tableProps: tableProps,\n    extraActions: {\n      export: {\n        showButton: true,\n        exportItemsFn: client.api.linksExportList,\n      },\n      import: {\n        showButton: true,\n        importItemsFn: client.api.linksImportCreate,\n        importSchema: getSchemaDto(\"LinkImportDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n      },\n      showColumnsPanel: true,\n      showFiltersPanel: true,\n    },\n    viewFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"details\",\n      editable: false,\n      deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n      getItemId: () =\u003e {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n    },\n    editFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"update\",\n      editable: true,\n      getItemId: () =\u003e {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n      onSaved: () =\u003e {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.links));\n      },\n    },\n    createFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"create\",\n      editable: true,\n      onSaved: () =\u003e {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.links));\n      },\n    },\n  });\n\n  return module;\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function GenericModule\u003cTView extends BasicTypeForGeneric, TCreate, TUpdate\u003e({\n  moduleName,\n  modulePath,\n  addButtonContent,\n  tableProps,\n  createFormProps,\n  editFormProps,\n  viewFormProps,\n  extraActions,\n}: GenericModuleProps\u003cTView, TCreate, TUpdate\u003e): JSX.Element {\n\n  const genericViewForm = viewFormProps \u0026\u0026 getForm(\"view\", \"View\", viewFormProps);\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cRoutes\u003e\n        \u003cRoute index element={genericTable} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={getAddFormRoute()} element={genericCreateForm} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={getEditFormRoute(1)} element={genericEditForm} /\u003e\n        \u003cRoute path={getViewFormRoute(1)} element={genericViewForm} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Routes\u003e\n      \u003cOutlet /\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 75,

          },

          },

            "text": "        \u003cRoute index element={genericTable} /\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 376,

          },

            "lineNumber": 377,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "      \u003c/Routes\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "      \u003cOutlet /\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 381,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Alert from \"@mui/material/Alert\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport { useNavigate, useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ModuleWrapper } from \"@components/module-wrapper\";\nimport { SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks } from \"../constants\";\nimport { SegmentCreateDto, SegmentDetailsDto, SegmentUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { CoreModule, getCoreModuleRoute, getViewFormRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { SegmentForm } from \"./segment-form\";\n\nexport const SegmentEdit = () =\u003e {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const { id } = useParams\u003c{ id: string }\u003e();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const [segment, setSegment] = useState\u003cSegmentDetailsDto | null\u003e(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const loadSegment = async () =\u003e {\n      if (!id) return;\n\n      try {\n        const result = await client.api.segmentsDetail(Number(id));\n        setSegment(result.data);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to load segment:\", error);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    loadSegment();\n  }, [id, client]);\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      \u003cModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks} currentBreadcrumb=\"Edit Segment\"\u003e\n        \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", justifyContent: \"center\", py: 4 }}\u003e\n          \u003cCircularProgress /\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003c/ModuleWrapper\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!segment) {\n    return (\n      \u003cModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={SegmentsBreadcrumbLinks} currentBreadcrumb=\"Edit Segment\"\u003e\n        \u003cAlert severity=\"error\"\u003eSegment not found\u003c/Alert\u003e\n      \u003c/ModuleWrapper\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  const handleSave = async (payload: SegmentCreateDto | SegmentUpdateDto) =\u003e {\n    await client.api.segmentsPartialUpdate(segment.id!, payload as SegmentUpdateDto);\n  };\n\n  const viewRoute = getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.segments) + \"/\" +;\n;",

});\n    },\n  };\n\n  const deleteProps = {\n    header: \"Data Management\",\n    description: \"Please be aware that what has been deleted can never be brought back.\",\n    entity:         "contents": " \"@components/data-management\";\n\nexport const OrderView = () =\u003e {\n  const context = useRequestContext();\n  const { client } = context;\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams\u003c{ id: string }\u003e();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n  const { notificationsService } = useNotificationsService();\n  const { setBusy } = useModuleWrapperContext();\n  const { Show: showErrorModal } = useErrorDetailsModal();\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState\u003cOrderDetailsDto | undefined\u003e();\n  const [contact, setContact] = useState\u003cContactDetailsDto\u003e();\n  const [contactCountry, setContactCountry] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"\");\n  const [orderItems, setOrderItems] = useState\u003cOrderItemDetailsDto[] | undefined\u003e();\n  const [isEdit, setIsEdit] = useState\u003cboolean\u003e(false);\n  const [orderItem, setOrderItem] = useState\u003cOrderItemDetailsDto\u003e();\n  const [openConfirmation, setOpenConfirmation] = useState(false);\n  const [isConfirmed, setIsConfirmed] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setBusy(async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.ordersDetail(id);\n        setContactState(data.contactId);\n        setOrder(data);\n        setOrderItems(await getOrderItems(data.id!));\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    });\n  }, [client]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isConfirmed) {\n      (async () =\u003e {\n        await execDeleteWithToast(deleteRecord, notificationsService, \"order item\", showErrorModal);\n      })();\n    }\n  }, [isConfirmed]);\n\n  const deleteRecord = async () =\u003e {\n    await client.api.orderItemsDelete(orderItem!.id!);\n    setOrderItems(await getOrderItems(order!.id!));\n    setIsConfirmed(false);\n  };\n\n  const setContactState = async (id: number) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data } = await client.api.contactsDetail(id);\n      setContact(data);\n      if (data.countryCode) {\n        setContactCountryState(data.countryCode);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.log(error);\n      notificationsService.error(\"Server error: could not retrieve contact details.\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const setContactCountryState = async (code: string) =\u003e\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { EmailTemplatesList } from \"./list\";\nimport { EmailTemplateEdit } from \"./edit\";\n\nexport const EmailTemplatesModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003cRoutes\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/\"} element={\u003cEmailTemplatesList /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/view\"} element={\u003cEmailTemplateEdit readonly /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={\u003cEmailTemplateEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/add\"} element={\u003cEmailTemplateEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n    \u003c/Routes\u003e\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "import { UserEdit } from \"./user-edit\";\nimport { Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { UserList } from \"./user-list\";\n\nexport const UserModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003cRoutes\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/\"} element={\u003cUserList /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={\u003cUserEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/view\"} element={\u003cUserEdit readonly /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/add\"} element={\u003cUserEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n    \u003c/Routes\u003e\n  );\n};",

        "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { Suspense } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { CoreModule, defaultModuleRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { ModuleWrapperProvider } from \"@providers/module-wrapper-provider\";\nimport { Navigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ErrorBoundary } from \"react-error-boundary\";\nimport { ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage } from \"@components/error-boundary-fallback-page\";\nimport { ContentModule } from \"@features/content/lazy\";\nimport { DashboardModule } from \"@features/dashboard/lazy\";\nimport { ContactsModule } from \"@features/contacts/lazy\";\nimport { AccountsModule } from \"@features/accounts/lazy\";\nimport { OrdersModule } from \"@features/orders/lazy\";\nimport { DomainsModule } from \"@features/domains/lazy\";\nimport { LinksModule } from \"@features/links/lazy\";\nimport { CommentsModule } from \"@features/comments/lazy\";\nimport { UnsubscribesModule } from \"@features/unsubscribes/lazy\";\nimport { UserModule } from \"@features/users/lazy\";\nimport { AboutModule } from \"@features/about/lazy\";\nimport { SegmentsModule } from \"@features/segments/lazy\";\nimport { EmailTemplatesModule } from \"@features/email-templates/lazy\";\nimport { ActivityLogModule } from \"@features/activity-log/lazy\";\nimport { MediaModule } from \"@features/media/lazy\";\nimport { SettingsModule } from \"@features/settings/lazy\";\nimport { TasksModule } from \"@features/tasks\";\n\nexport const ModuleLoader = () =\u003e {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams;\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const UnsubscribesModule = \n\n\n  const module = GenericModule({\n    moduleName: \"Unsubscribes\",\n    modulePath: CoreModule.unsubscribes,\n    tableProps: tableProps,\n    extraActions: {\n      export: {\n        showButton: true,\n        exportItemsFn: client.api.unsubscribesExportList,\n      },\n      import: {\n        showButton: true,\n        importItemsFn: client.api.unsubscribesImportCreate,\n        importSchema: getSchemaDto(\"UnsubscribeImportDto\", swaggerJson.components.schemas),\n      },\n      showColumnsPanel: true,\n      showFiltersPanel: true,\n    },\n    viewFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"details\",\n      editable: false,\n      deleteOptionProps: deleteProps,\n      getItemId: () =\u003e {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/view$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n    },\n    editFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"update\",\n      editable: true,\n      getItemId: () =\u003e {\n        const params = useParams();\n        return Number(params \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"] \u0026\u0026 params[\"*\"].match(/^(\\d+)\\/edit$/)?.[1]);\n      },\n      onSaved: () =\u003e {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));\n      },\n    },\n    createFormProps: {\n      ...formProps,\n      mode: \"create\",\n      editable: true,\n      onSaved: () =\u003e {\n        navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.unsubscribes));\n      },\n    },\n  });\n\n  return module;\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { ContactDetailsDto, ContactUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContactForm } from \"../form\";\n\nexport const ContactEdit = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams\u003c{ id: string }\u003e();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [contact, setContact] = useState\u003cContactDetailsDto\u003e({\n    firstName: \"\",\n    email: \"\",\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    (async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.contactsDetail(id);\n        setContact(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newContact: ContactDetailsDto) =\u003e {\n    const updateDto: ContactUpdateDto = {\n      ...newContact,\n    };\n    await client.api.contactsPartialUpdate(id, updateDto);\n  };\n\n  return \u003cContactForm contact={contact} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /\u003e;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 2,

            "lineNumber": 25,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { OrderDetailsDto, OrderUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { OrderForm } from \"../form\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nexport const OrderEdit = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams\u003c{ id: string }\u003e();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [order, setOrder] = useState\u003cOrderDetailsDto\u003e();\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    (async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.ordersDetail(id);\n        setOrder(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newOrder: OrderDetailsDto) =\u003e {\n    const updateDto: OrderUpdateDto = {\n      ...newOrder!,\n    };\n    await client.api.ordersPartialUpdate(id, updateDto!);\n  };\n\n  return \u003cOrderForm order={order} updateOrder={setOrder} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /\u003e;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CoreModule = {\n  dashboard: \"dashboard\",\n  contacts: \"contacts\",\n  links: \"links\",\n  comments: \"comments\",\n  content: \"content\",\n  media: \"media\",\n  accounts: \"accounts\",\n  orders: \"orders\",\n  deals: \"deals\",\n  domains: \"domains\",\n  segments: \"segments\",\n  unsubscribes: \"unsubscribes\",\n  users: \"users\",\n  about: \"about\",\n  emailTemplates: \"email-templates\",\n  activityLogs: \"activity-logs\",\n  settings: \"settings\",\n  tasks: \"tasks\",\n} as const;\n\nexport type CoreModuleType = typeof CoreModule[keyof typeof CoreModule];",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "export const CoreModule = {"
          },

        "contents": "export const App = \n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cLocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}\u003e\n      \u003cConfigProvider\u003e\n        \u003cGlobalLanguageFilterProvider\u003e\n          \u003cTranslationDraftProvider\u003e\n            \u003cLayoutProvider\u003e\n              \u003cThemeProvider\u003e\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { AccountDetailsDto, AccountUpdateDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"providers/request-provider\";\nimport { AccountForm } from \"../form\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nexport const AccountEdit = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n\n  const { id: idParam } = useParams\u003c{ id: string }\u003e();\n  const id = Number(idParam);\n\n  const [account, setAccount] = useState\u003cAccountDetailsDto\u003e({ name: \"\" });\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    (async () =\u003e {\n      try {\n        const { data } = await client.api.accountsDetail(id);\n        setAccount(data);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.log(e);\n      }\n    })();\n  }, [client]);\n\n  const handleSave = async (newAccount: AccountDetailsDto) =\u003e {\n    const updateDto: AccountUpdateDto = {\n      ...newAccount,\n    };\n    await client.api.accountsPartialUpdate(id, updateDto!);\n  };\n\n  return \u003cAccountForm account={account} handleSave={handleSave} isEdit={true} /\u003e;\n};",

_**Agent (default)**_


Types are consistent. Summary of changes:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. Centralized route parameter types (`src/lib/router/index.ts`)
- Added `ModuleRouteParams` for routes with `moduleName`
- Added `IdRouteParams` for routes with `id`
- Added `ModuleWithIdRouteParams` for routes with both
- Types use `Record`-compatible structure for React Router compatibility

### 2. Updated all files to use centralized types
- `src/features/module-loader/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/components/app-layout/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/components/data-management/index.tsx` - Uses `ModuleRouteParams`
- `src/features/orders/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/orders/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/view/logs/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/contacts/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/accounts/edit/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/segments/view/details/index.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`
- `src/features/segments/form/edit.tsx` - Uses `IdRouteParams`

### 3. Fixed type issues
- Fixed `buildMenuItems` return type to properly filter out nulls
- Exported `SidebarMenuSection` from `build-menu-items.ts` for reuse
- Updated `Sidebar` component to import the shared type

### 4. Code structure improvements
- No duplicate type definitions
- Centralized route param types in one location
- Consistent typing across the codebase
- Type-safe route parameter handling

All linter errors are resolved, and the codebase now uses a consistent, maintainable type system.

---

_**Agent (default)**_


Updated the route functions to return route templates when no ID is provided.

## Changes Made

**`src/lib/router/index.ts`**:
- `getEditFormRoute(id?: number)`:
  - With ID: returns `"123/edit"` (actual path for navigation)
  - Without ID: returns `":id/edit"` (route template for React Router)
- `getViewFormRoute(id?: number)`:
  - With ID: returns `"123/view"` (actual path for navigation)
  - Without ID: returns `":id/view"` (route template for React Router)

This allows:
1. Route definitions: `<Route path={getEditFormRoute()} />` → matches `/:id/edit`
2. Navigation: `navigate(getEditFormRoute(123))` → navigates to `/123/edit`

The `:id` parameter is now generic and works in both contexts. No linter errors found.

_**Agent (default)**_


The React DevTools message is informational and appears in development. It’s not an error and isn’t related to the routing changes.

**What it means:**
- React suggests installing React DevTools for debugging
- It’s a development-only message
- It doesn’t affect functionality

**If you want to reduce it:**
1. Install React DevTools (Chrome/Firefox extension) — the message will stop
2. Or ignore it — it’s harmless

**To verify routing is working:**
- Routes should match correctly
- Navigation should work
- No console errors related to routing

If you see actual errors (not just this message), share the details and I can help debug. The routing code looks correct with no linter errors.

Is routing working as expected, or are you seeing specific issues beyond this message?

_**Agent (default)**_


All files have been updated. Summary of changes:

## Fixed Files

Updated 5 module files that were using the old typesafe-routes API:

1. **`src/features/segments/segments-module.tsx`**
   - Changed `addFormRoute.template` → `getAddFormRoute()`
   - Changed `editFormRoute.template` → `getEditFormRoute()`
   - Changed `viewFormRoute.template` → `getViewFormRoute()`

2. **`src/features/orders/orders-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"` (static route)

3. **`src/features/domains/domains-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references to use functions

4. **`src/features/contacts/contacts-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"`
   - Changed `contactLogsRoute.template` → `"logs"`

5. **`src/features/accounts/accounts-module.tsx`**
   - Updated all route references
   - Changed `detailsRoute.template` → `"details"`

All files now use the new function-based API:
- `getAddFormRoute()` → returns `"add"` or `":id/add"` (when no ID)
- `getEditFormRoute()` → returns `":id/edit"` (route template)
- `getViewFormRoute()` → returns `":id/view"` (route template)

The error should be resolved. The app should work correctly now.

---

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { createTheme, ThemeProvider as MUIThemeProvider } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport CssBaseline from \"@mui/material/CssBaseline\";\nimport { ThemeOptions } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const themeOptions: ThemeOptions = {\n  spacing: 4,\n  typography: {\n    fontFamily: \"'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', sans-serif\",\n    h3: {\n      fontSize: \"36px\",\n      fontWeight: 600,\n      lineHeight: \"42px\",\n    },\n    subtitle1: {\n      fontSize: \"16px\",\n      fontWeight: 500,\n      lineHeight: \"20px\",\n    },\n    subtitle2: {\n      fontSize: \"12px\",\n      fontWeight: 600,\n      lineHeight: \"16px\",\n      color: \"#6B7280\",\n    },\n  },\n  palette: {\n    primary: {\n      main: \"#3878FF\",\n      light: \"#f0f4ff\",\n      dark: \"#2854B2\",\n    },\n    secondary: {\n      main: \"#0b0b0d\",\n      light: \"#f8faff\",\n      dark: \"#060A10\",\n    },\n    text: {\n      primary: \"#0b0b0d\",\n      secondary: \"#0b0b0ddb\",\n      disabled: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38)\",\n    },\n    info: {\n      main: \"#2196F3\",\n      light: \"#64B6F7\",\n      dark: \"#0B79D0\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFF\",\n    },\n    success: {\n      main: \"#52AF21\",\n      light: \"#7BC652\",\n      dark: \"#3B7E17\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFF\",\n    },\n    error: {\n      main: \"#C82828\",\n      light: \"#D55858\",\n      dark: \"#8E1C1C\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFF\",\n    },\n    warning: {\n      main: \"#ff9800\",\n      light: \"#FFB547\",\n      dark: \"#C77700\",\n      contrastText: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.87)\",\n    },\n    background: {\n      default: \"#ffffff\",\n      primary: \"#fbfcff\",\n      primaryHover: \"#F1F2F4\",\n      secondary: \"#FAFCFF\",\n    },\n  },\n  components: {\n    MuiButton: {\n      styleOverrides: {\n        root: {\n          textTransform: \"none\",\n        },\n      },\n    },\n    MuiCardContent: {\n      styleOverrides: {\n        root: {\n          paddingLeft: \"23px\",\n        },\n      },\n    },\n  },\n} as ThemeOptions;\n\nconst mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);",

        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\nimport Drawer from \"@mui/material/Drawer\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Chip from \"@mui/material/Chip\";\nimport { Component } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport {\n  MDXEditor,\n  headingsPlugin,\n  quotePlugin,\n  listsPlugin,\n  linkPlugin,\n  linkDialogPlugin,\n  imagePlugin,\n  tablePlugin,\n  thematicBreakPlugin,\n  frontmatterPlugin,\n  codeBlockPlugin,\n  codeMirrorPlugin,\n  markdownShortcutPlugin,\n  toolbarPlugin,\n  diffSourcePlugin,\n  jsxPlugin,\n  BoldItalicUnderlineToggles,\n  CodeToggle,\n  CreateLink,\n  InsertImage,\n  InsertTable,\n  InsertThematicBreak,\n  ListsToggle,\n  Separator,\n  DiffSourceToggleWrapper,\n} from \"@mdxeditor/editor\";\nimport SyntaxValidationPreview from \"@components/syntax-validation-preview\";\nimport { MDXEditorNewProps } from \"./types\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useMdxComponents } from \"./hooks\";\nimport { MdxComponentsPanel } from \"./components\";\nimport { buildSourceModeExtensions, buildCodeBlockExtensions } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport type { ImageUploadCallbacks, ImageUploadError } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { isCodeEditorLineNumbersEnabled } from \"@utils/config-helpers\";\nimport { useNotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { useErrorDetailsModal } from \"@providers/error-details-modal-provider\";\nimport { parseApiError } from \"@utils/api-error-parser\";\nimport { toast } from \"react-toastify\";\nimport \"@mdxeditor/editor/style.css\";\nimport \"./styles.css\";\n\nconst MDXEditorNew = (\n;",

        "contents": "import Dialog from \"@mui/material/Dialog\";\nimport DialogContent from \"@mui/material/DialogContent\";\nimport DialogTitle from \"@mui/material/DialogTitle\";\nimport DialogActions from \"@mui/material/DialogActions\";\nimport Tabs from \"@mui/material/Tabs\";\nimport Tab from \"@mui/material/Tab\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Button from \"@mui/material/Button\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport TextField from \"@mui/material/TextField\";\nimport {\n  Download as DownloadIcon,\n  Copy as FileCopyIcon,\n  ArrowLeftRight as SwapHorizIcon,\n  FileType as PictureAsPdfIcon,\n  Film as MovieIcon\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { buildAbsoluteUrlWithCacheBust } from \"@lib/network/utils\";\nimport { MediaDetailsDto, ProblemDetails } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useNotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { ApiErrorDisplay } from \"@components/api-error-display\";\n\ninterface MediaPreviewProps {\n  file: MediaDetailsDto | null;\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () =\u003e void;\n  onDownload: (file: MediaDetailsDto) =\u003e void;\n  onCopyLink: (file: MediaDetailsDto) =\u003e void;\n  onNext?: () =\u003e void;\n  onPrev?: () =\u003e void;\n  hasNext?: boolean;\n  hasPrev?: boolean;\n  onReplace?: (file: MediaDetailsDto) =\u003e void;\n  onFileUpdate?: (updatedFile: MediaDetailsDto) =\u003e void;\n}\n\nconst formatFileSize = (size: number | undefined) =\u003e\n;",

        "contents": "import \"./styles.css\";\n\nconst MDXEditorNew = ({\n  value,\n  onChange,\n  isReadOnly,\n  contentDetails,\n  onContentChangeStatus,\n  livePreview,\n  livePreviewTemplate,\n  isMetadataCollapsed,\n  preloadedMdxComponents,\n  originalContentForDiff,\n  contentFormat,\n}: MDXEditorNewProps) =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const { notificationsService } = useNotificationsService();\n  const { Show: showErrorModal } = useErrorDetailsModal();\n  const [initialContent, setInitialContent] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"\");\n  const [previewKey, setPreviewKey] = useState\u003cnumber\u003e(Date.now());\n  const [hasContentChanged, setHasContentChanged] = useState\u003cboolean\u003e(false);\n  const [componentsPanelOpen, setComponentsPanelOpen] = useState\u003cboolean\u003e(false);\n  // Track currently uploading image files by name\n  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars\n  const [uploadingImages, setUploadingImages] = useState\u003cSet\u003cstring\u003e\u003e(new Set());\n  const [pendingChanges, setPendingChanges] = useState\u003cboolean\u003e(false);\n\n  // Fetch custom MDX components for the current content type\n  const { components: mdxComponents } = useMdxComponents({\n    contentType: contentDetails.type,\n    useCache: true,\n    maxCacheAgeHours: 1,\n    preloadedData: preloadedMdxComponents,\n  });\n\n  // Log available components for development\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (mdxComponents.length \u003e 0) {\n      console.log(\"Available MDX components for content type:\", contentDetails.type, mdxComponents);\n    }\n  }, [mdxComponents, contentDetails.type]);\n\n  // Store initial content for diff comparison when component mounts\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (initialContent === \"\" \u0026\u0026 value) {\n      // Use original content for diff if provided (for AI editing), otherwise use current value\n      const diffBase = originalContentForDiff || value;\n      setInitialContent(diffBase);\n    }\n  }, [value, initialContent, originalContentForDiff]);\n\n  // Track content changes to determine when to switch to live preview\n;",

        "contents": "import Dialog from \"@mui/material/Dialog\";\nimport DialogTitle from \"@mui/material/DialogTitle\";\nimport DialogContent from \"@mui/material/DialogContent\";\nimport DialogActions from \"@mui/material/DialogActions\";\nimport Button from \"@mui/material/Button\";\nimport FormControl from \"@mui/material/FormControl\";\nimport RadioGroup from \"@mui/material/RadioGroup\";\nimport FormControlLabel from \"@mui/material/FormControlLabel\";\nimport Radio from \"@mui/material/Radio\";\nimport Checkbox from \"@mui/material/Checkbox\";\nimport FormGroup from \"@mui/material/FormGroup\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport Alert from \"@mui/material/Alert\";\nimport { GridColDef, GridColumnVisibilityModel, GridValidRowModel } from \"@mui/x-data-grid\";\nimport { X } from \"lucide-react\";\n\ninterface ExportPopupProps\u003cTModel extends GridValidRowModel\u003e {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () =\u003e void;\n  onExport: (exportScope: string, fileFormat: string, selectedColumns: string[]) =\u003e void;\n  columns: GridColDef\u003cTModel\u003e[];\n  selectedCount: number;\n  columnVisibilityModel?: GridColumnVisibilityModel;\n  exporting?: boolean;\n  errorMessage?: string | null;\n  hasActiveFilters: boolean;\n  hasSearchText: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const ExportPopup = \u003cTModel extends GridValidRowModel\u003e\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import Dialog from \"@mui/material/Dialog\";"
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const MdxComponentsPanel: React.FC\u003cMdxComponentsPanelProps\u003e = ({\n  components,\n  onClosePanel,\n}) =\u003e {\n  if (components.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cBox sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: \"center\", color: \"text.secondary\" }}\u003e\n        \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\"\u003e\n          No custom components available for this content type\n        \u003c/Typography\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox sx={{ p: 1 }}\u003e\n      {components.map((component) =\u003e {\n        const defaultMarkup = generateComponentMarkup(component);\n        const example =\n          component.examples \u0026\u0026 component.examples.length \u003e 0 ? component.examples[0] : undefined;\n\n        return (\n          \u003cAccordion key={component.name} sx={{ mb: 1 }}\u003e\n            \u003cAccordionSummary expandIcon={\u003cChevronDown size={16} /\u003e}\u003e\n              \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 1, width: \"100%\" }}\u003e\n                \u003cTypography variant=\"subtitle2\"\u003e{component.name}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n                \u003cBox sx={{ flex: 1 }} /\u003e\n                {!!component.usageCount \u0026\u0026 component.usageCount \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cTooltip title=\"Approximate usage count across content\"\u003e\n                    \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n                      Used {component.usageCount} time(s)\n                    \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                  \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/Box\u003e\n            \u003c/AccordionSummary\u003e\n\n            \u003cAccordionDetails\u003e\n      }\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport CardContent from \"@mui/material/CardContent\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\nexport const AboutModule = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const [backendVersion, setBackendVersion] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const getVersion = async () =\u003e {\n      const { data } = await client.api.versionList();\n      setBackendVersion(data.version || \"Unknown\");\n    };\n    getVersion();\n  });\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={[]} currentBreadcrumb={\"About\"}\u003e\n      \u003cGrid container gap={5}\u003e\n        \u003cGrid size={{ xs: \"auto\" }}\u003e\n          \u003cCard sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent\u003e\n              \u003cTypography\u003eFrontend Version: {process.env.VERSION}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        \u003c/Grid\u003e\n        \u003cGrid size={{ xs: \"auto\" }}\u003e\n          \u003cCard sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent\u003e\n              \u003cTypography\u003e\n                Backend version:\n                {backendVersion ? (\n                  backendVersion\n                ) : (\n                  \u003cCircularProgress size={\"0.8rem\"} sx={{ marginLeft: \"2rem\" }} /\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        \u003c/Grid\u003e\n      \u003c/Grid\u003e\n    \u003c/ModuleWrapper\u003e\n  );\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import CardContent from \"@mui/material/CardContent\";"

            "text": "  const [backendVersion, setBackendVersion] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);"

            "lineNumber": 13,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    const getVersion = async () =\u003e {"

            "lineNumber": 15,

          },
          {

            "text": "      setBackendVersion(data.version || \"Unknown\");"
          },

            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  return ("

            "text": "    \u003cModuleWrapper breadcrumbs={[]} currentBreadcrumb={\"About\"}\u003e"

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003cGrid size={{ xs: \"auto\" }}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "          \u003cCard sx={{ minWidth: 275 }}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            \u003cCardContent\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "              \u003cTypography\u003eFrontend Version: {process.env.VERSION}\u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            \u003c/CardContent\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

          },

            "lineNumber": 29,

          },

            "lineNumber": 31,

          },

            "lineNumber": 32,

            "lineNumber": 33,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Tooltip from \"@mui/material/Tooltip\";\nimport Accordion from \"@mui/material/Accordion\";\nimport AccordionSummary from \"@mui/material/AccordionSummary\";\nimport AccordionDetails from \"@mui/material/AccordionDetails\";\nimport Stack from \"@mui/material/Stack\";\nimport { ChevronDown, Copy } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { MdxComponentDto, MdxComponentPropertyDto } from \"@lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { MdxCodeBlock } from \"./mdx-code-block\";\n\ninterface MdxComponentsPanelProps {\n  components: MdxComponentDto[];\n  onClosePanel?: () =\u003e void;\n}\n\n/**\n * Format a property value for proper JSX syntax\n * For booleans: returns null if false (to omit the attribute), true if true (for shorthand syntax)\n */",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import React from \"react\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import Tooltip from \"@mui/material/Tooltip\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import Accordion from \"@mui/material/Accordion\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import AccordionSummary from \"@mui/material/AccordionSummary\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import AccordionDetails from \"@mui/material/AccordionDetails\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import Stack from \"@mui/material/Stack\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import { ChevronDown, Copy } from \"lucide-react\";"

_**Agent (default)**_


## Migration difficulty: Very high

### Current MUI usage
- 1,055 MUI references across 147 files
- Core dependencies:
  - `@mui/material` (core components)
  - `@mui/x-data-grid` (data tables)
  - `@mui/x-date-pickers` (date pickers)
  - `@emotion/react` & `@emotion/styled` (styling system)
- Custom theme with specific colors, typography, and component overrides

### Major challenges

1. DataGrid replacement
   - `@mui/x-data-grid` is heavily used
   - shadcn has no equivalent
   - Options: TanStack Table (more work) or keep MUI DataGrid

2. Styling system change
   - MUI uses Emotion
   - shadcn uses Tailwind CSS
   - Requires rewriting styled components and theme

3. Component mapping
   - Many MUI components need shadcn equivalents
   - Some features may be missing or require custom work

4. Date pickers
   - `@mui/x-date-pickers` is integrated
   - shadcn uses react-day-picker (different API)

5. Theme migration
   - Custom MUI theme needs conversion to Tailwind config
   - Component overrides need to be reimplemented

### Estimated effort
- Time: 3–6 months for a team
- Files to change: ~150+ files
- Risk: High (breaking changes, regressions)

### Recommendation

Option 1: Hybrid approach (recommended)
- Keep MUI DataGrid and DatePickers
- Migrate simpler components (buttons, cards, dialogs) to shadcn gradually
- Use Tailwind alongside Emotion during transition

Option 2: Full migration
- Only if you need shadcn’s design system
- Budget 3–6 months
- Consider a complete rewrite

Option 3: Stay with MUI
- MUI is mature and well-suited for admin panels
- Your current setup is working
- Consider MUI v6 when available

### If you proceed
1. Start with a small feature/module
2. Set up Tailwind CSS alongside Emotion
3. Create a component mapping document
4. Build wrapper components for gradual migration
5. Keep MUI DataGrid and DatePickers initially

Should I create a migration plan or help set up a hybrid approach?

_**User**_

I just see that material ui looks quite outdated. I want it make more modern

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// or \"@material-ui/core/styles\" for older versions\n\nimport \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\n// Add custom theme properties\ndeclare module \"@mui/material/styles\" {\n  interface Theme extends MuiTheme {\n    palette: MuiTheme[\"palette\"];\n    background: {\n      primary: string;\n      primaryHover: string;\n    };\n  }\n  interface ThemeOptions extends MuiTheme {\n    background?: {\n      primary?: string;\n      primaryHover?: string;\n    };\n    unstable_sx?: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e; // Use a more specific type for unstable_sx\n  }\n}\n\n// Export empty to make this a module\nexport {};",

        "contents": "import styled from \"@emotion/styled\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\n\nexport const DataTableContainer = styled(Paper)&#96;\n  flex-grow: 1;\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders {\n    --DataGrid-t-header-background-base: #f8faff;\n  }\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader {\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-row:hover {\n    background-color: #fafcff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    font-size: 20px;\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root,\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.MuiCheckbox-indeterminate .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff !important;\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const DataTableContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  min-height: 400px;\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-root {\n    border: none;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-cell {\n    outline: none !important;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders {\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root {\n    padding: 2px;\n  }\n  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    font-size: 16px;\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const ViewListItemText = styled(ListItemText)&#96;\n  .MuiListItemText-primary {\n    font-size: ${({ theme }) =\u003e theme.typography.body2.fontSize};\n    font-weight: 500;\n  }\n  .MuiListItemText-secondary {\n    font-size: ${({ theme }) =\u003e theme.typography.body2.fontSize};\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ViewRowGrid = styled(Grid)({\n  minHeight: 60,\n  alignItems: \"center\",\n});",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Card: React.FC\u003cCardProps\u003e = ({ title, subtitle, action, children }) =\u003e (\n  \u003cPaper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      height: \"100%\",\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      borderRadius: 2,\n      borderColor: (t) =\u003e t.palette.divider,\n      transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s\",\n      \"\u0026:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n    }}\n  \u003e\n    {(title || action) \u0026\u0026 (\n      \u003cStack direction=\"row\" alignItems=\"center\" justifyContent=\"space-between\" sx={{ mb: 1 }}\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          {title \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"h6\" sx={{ lineHeight: 1.2 }}\u003e\n              {title}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n          {subtitle \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n              {subtitle}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        {action}\n      \u003c/Stack\u003e\n    )}\n    \u003cBox\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        flex: 1,\n        minHeight: 0,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      {children}\n    \u003c/Box\u003e\n  \u003c/Paper\u003e\n);\n\ntype LineChartPoint = { label: string; a: number; b: number };",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ToolbarButton: React.FC\u003cToolbarButtonProps\u003e = ({\n  startIcon,\n  children,\n  sx,\n  ...props\n}) =\u003e {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n\n  return (\n    \u003cButton\n      variant=\"outlined\"\n      color=\"secondary\"\n      startIcon={startIcon}\n      sx={{\n        backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.secondary,\n        borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n        \"\u0026:hover\": {\n          backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n        },\n        ...sx,\n      }}\n      {...props}\n    \u003e\n      {children}\n    \u003c/Button\u003e\n  );\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "export const ToolbarButton: React.FC\u003cToolbarButtonProps\u003e = ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  startIcon,"

          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  children,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  sx,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  ...props"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "}) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  const theme = useTheme();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  return ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    \u003cButton"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      variant=\"outlined\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      color=\"secondary\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      startIcon={startIcon}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      sx={{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.secondary,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        \"\u0026:hover\": {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "          backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,"
          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\nimport Drawer from \"@mui/material/Drawer\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Chip from \"@mui/material/Chip\";\nimport { Component } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport {\n  MDXEditor,\n  headingsPlugin,\n  quotePlugin,\n  listsPlugin,\n  linkPlugin,\n  linkDialogPlugin,\n  imagePlugin,\n  tablePlugin,\n  thematicBreakPlugin,\n  frontmatterPlugin,\n  codeBlockPlugin,\n  codeMirrorPlugin,\n  markdownShortcutPlugin,\n  toolbarPlugin,\n  diffSourcePlugin,\n  jsxPlugin,\n  BoldItalicUnderlineToggles,\n  CodeToggle,\n  CreateLink,\n  InsertImage,\n  InsertTable,\n  InsertThematicBreak,\n  ListsToggle,\n  Separator,\n  DiffSourceToggleWrapper,\n} from \"@mdxeditor/editor\";\nimport SyntaxValidationPreview from \"@components/syntax-validation-preview\";\nimport { MDXEditorNewProps } from \"./types\";\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport { useMdxComponents } from \"./hooks\";\nimport { MdxComponentsPanel } from \"./components\";\nimport { buildSourceModeExtensions, buildCodeBlockExtensions } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport type { ImageUploadCallbacks, ImageUploadError } from \"./codemirror-extensions\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { isCodeEditorLineNumbersEnabled } from \"@utils/config-helpers\";\nimport { useNotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { useErrorDetailsModal } from \"@providers/error-details-modal-provider\";\nimport { parseApiError } from \"@utils/api-error-parser\";\nimport { toast } from \"react-toastify\";\nimport \"@mdxeditor/editor/style.css\";\nimport \"./styles.css\";\n\nconst MDXEditorNew = (\n;",
