    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport Toolbar from \"@mui/material/Toolbar\";\n\nexport const AppBarStyled = styled(AppBar)&#96;\n  position: sticky;\n  top: 0;\n  z-index: 1100;\n  height: 64px;\n  background-color: ${({ theme }) =\u003e theme.palette.background.default};\n  border-bottom: 1px solid\n    ${({ theme }) =\u003e\n      theme.palette.mode === \"dark\" ? theme.palette.secondary.light : theme.palette.divider};\n  box-shadow: none;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: center;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const AppBarToolbar = styled(Toolbar)\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * A syntax-highlighted code block component specifically for MDX examples\n * Uses the same CodeEditor that's used elsewhere in the application\n */\nexport const MdxCodeBlock: React.FC\u003cMdxCodeBlockProps\u003e = ({ code, readOnly = true }) =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003cBox\n      sx={{\n        borderRadius: 1,\n        overflow: \"hidden\",\n        backgroundColor: \"grey.100\",\n        border: \"1px solid\",\n        borderColor: \"grey.300\",\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor\": {\n          backgroundColor: \"transparent !important\",\n          minHeight: \"auto !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-text\": {\n          fontFamily: \"monospace !important\",\n          fontSize: \"0.8rem !important\",\n          lineHeight: \"1.4 !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-focus\": {\n          outline: \"none !important\",\n          boxShadow: \"none !important\",\n        },\n        // Enhanced syntax highlighting colors for better readability\n        \"\u0026 .token.tag\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\", // HTML/JSX tags\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.attr-name\": {\n          color: \"#6f42c1 !important\", // Attribute names\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.attr-value\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\", // Attribute values\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.string\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\", // Strings\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.comment\": {\n          color: \"#6a737d !important\", // Comments\n          fontStyle: \"italic !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.keyword\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\", // Keywords (function, const, etc.)\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .token.punctuation\": {\n          color: \"#24292e !important\", // Brackets, parentheses, etc.\n        },\n        // Legacy selectors for older versions\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-var\": {\n          color: \"#d73a49 !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-property\": {\n          color: \"#6f42c1 !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-string\": {\n          color: \"#032f62 !important\",\n        },\n        \"\u0026 .w-tc-editor-comment\": {\n          color: \"#6a737d !important\",\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "/**"
          },

            "lineNumber": 29,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const DashboardListItem = styled(ListItem)({\n  alignItems: \"center\",\n  paddingLeft: \"0\",\n  disablePadding: true,\n});\n\nexport const DashboardListItemText = styled(ListItemText)\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "export const DashboardListItem = styled(ListItem)({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  alignItems: \"center\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  paddingLeft: \"0\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  disablePadding: true,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "export const DashboardListItemText = styled(ListItemText)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const MetricTile: React.FC\u003c{\n  label: string;\n  value?: number | string | null;\n  valueFormatter?: (n: number) =\u003e string;\n  changePct?: number | null;\n  loading?: boolean;\n}\u003e = ({ label, value, valueFormatter, changePct, loading }) =\u003e (\n  \u003cPaper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      minHeight: 140,\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s\",\n      \"\u0026:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n    }}\n  \u003e\n    \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}\u003e\n      {label}\n    \u003c/Typography\u003e\n    {loading ? (\n      \u003cBox\u003e\n        \u003cSkeleton width={80} height={32} /\u003e\n        \u003cSkeleton width={120} height={20} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    ) : (\n      \u003c\u003e\n        \u003cBox\u003e\n          {typeof value === \"number\" ? (\n            \u003cNumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /\u003e\n          ) : (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"h4\"\u003e{value ?? \"—\"}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n        \u003cStack direction=\"row\" spacing={1} alignItems=\"center\"\u003e\n          \u003cChangeChip pct={changePct ?? undefined} /\u003e\n          {changePct !== null \u0026\u0026 changePct !== undefined \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n              {\"vs. previous period\"}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Stack\u003e\n      \u003c/\u003e\n    )}\n  \u003c/Paper\u003e\n);\n\nconst SectionLoader = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cStack gap={1}\u003e\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "const MetricTile: React.FC\u003c{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "  label: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "  value?: number | string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "  valueFormatter?: (n: number) =\u003e string;"
          },
          {

            "text": "  changePct?: number | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "  loading?: boolean;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "}\u003e = ({ label, value, valueFormatter, changePct, loading }) =\u003e ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "  \u003cPaper"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    variant=\"outlined\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "    sx={{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "      p: 6.25,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "      minHeight: 140,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "      display: \"flex\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "      flexDirection: \"column\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "      gap: 1.25,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "      transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "      \"\u0026:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "  \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "    \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "      {label}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    \u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "    {loading ? ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      \u003cBox\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "        \u003cSkeleton width={80} height={32} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "        \u003cSkeleton width={120} height={20} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "      \u003c/Box\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "    ) : ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "      \u003c\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "        \u003cBox\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "          {typeof value === \"number\" ? ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "            \u003cNumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "          ) : ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "            \u003cTypography variant=\"h4\"\u003e{value ?? \"—\"}\u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "          )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "        \u003c/Box\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        \u003cStack direction=\"row\" spacing={1} alignItems=\"center\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "          \u003cChangeChip pct={changePct ?? undefined} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "          {changePct !== null \u0026\u0026 changePct !== undefined \u0026\u0026 ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "            \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "              {\"vs. previous period\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "            \u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "          )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "        \u003c/Stack\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "      \u003c/\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "    )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "  \u003c/Paper\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": ");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "const SectionLoader = () =\u003e ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "  \u003cStack gap={1}\u003e"

            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": ";"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function GenericForm\u003cTView extends BasicTypeForGeneric, TCreate, TUpdate\u003e({\n  editable,\n  getItemFn,\n  createItemFn,\n  updateItemFn,\n  detailsSchema,\n  updateSchema,\n  createSchema,\n  mode,\n  getItemId,\n  onSaved,\n  customDictionaries,\n  triggerSave,\n  triggerCancel,\n  onSaveHandled,\n  onCancelHandled,\n  fieldSections,\n}: GenericFormProps\u003cTView, TCreate, TUpdate\u003e) {\n(section) =\u003e {\n\n                  )}\n                  \u003cBox\n                    display=\"grid\"\n                    gridTemplateColumns={{ xs: \"1fr\", sm: \"1fr 1fr\", md: \"1fr 1fr 1fr\" }}\n                    gap={4}\n                    width=\"100%\"\n                    maxWidth=\"100%\"\n                  \u003e\n                    {sectionFields.map((field) =\u003e (\n                      \u003cGrid key={field.name} marginBottom={0}\u003e\n                        {editable ? getEdit(field) : getView(field)}\n                      \u003c/Grid\u003e\n                    ))}\n                  \u003c/Box\u003e\n                \u003c/Box\u003e\n              );\n            })\n          ) : (\n            \u003cGrid container spacing={4} marginBottom={4}\u003e\n              \u003cGrid container size={{ xs: 12, sm: 12 }}\u003e\n                {SectionIcon \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cBox sx={{ mr: 1.5, display: \"flex\", color: \"primary.main\" }}\u003e\n                    \u003cSectionIcon size={22} /\u003e\n                  \u003c/Box\u003e\n                )}\n                \u003cTypography variant=\"subtitle1\" fontWeight=\"500\" color=\"primary.main\"\u003e\n                  {&#96;Add ${moduleName} Details&#96;}\n                \u003c/Typography\u003e\n              \u003c/Grid\u003e\n              {fieldsSet()\n                .filter((field) =\u003e !field.hide)\n                .map((field) =\u003e\n                  editable ? (\n                    \u003cGrid key={field.name} size={{ xs: 4, sm: 4 }}\u003e\n                      {getEdit(field)}\n                    \u003c/Grid\u003e\n                  ) : (\n                    \u003cGrid key={field.name} size={{ xs: 3, sm: 3 }}\u003e\n                      {getView(field)}\n                    \u003c/Grid\u003e\n                  )\n                )}\n            \u003c/Grid\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n      \u003c/Card\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/* MDX Editor Container */\n.mdx-editor-container {\n  height: 100%;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Main MDX Editor Styling */\n.mdx-editor-new {\n  height: 100%;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Content area with proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n  min-height: 400px;\n  font-family: \"Helvetica Neue\", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  padding: 16px;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 144px);\n}\n\n/* Ensure prosemirror editor has proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-new .ProseMirror {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: none !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n/* CodeMirror editor scrolling for source mode */\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-editor {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 244px) !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-scroller {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  overflow-x: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Toolbar customization */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  background-color: #fafafa;\n}\n\n/* Ensure diff/source toggle buttons are visible */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"diff-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"source-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"view\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"diff\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"source\"] {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  visibility: visible !important;\n  opacity: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Style the diff/source mode toggle buttons */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button {\n  margin-right: 8px;\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  background-color: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #ddd;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Card from \"@mui/material/Card\";\nimport CardHeader from \"@mui/material/CardHeader\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport ListItem from \"@mui/material/ListItem\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const ActionsContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const LeftContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const SearchBar = ({\n  setSearchTermOnChange,\n  searchBoxLabel,\n  initialValue,\n}: SearchBoxProps) =\u003e {\n  const [searchValue, setSearchValue] = useState(initialValue || \"\");\n  const [timer, setTimer] = useState\u003cNodeJS.Timeout | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setSearchValue(initialValue || \"\");\n  }, [initialValue]);\n\n  const handleChange = (event: React.ChangeEvent\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const value = event.target.value;\n    setSearchValue(value);\n\n    if (timer) {\n      clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n    setTimer(\n      setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n        setSearchTermOnChange(value);\n      }, 800)\n    );\n  };\n\n  const handleClear = () =\u003e {\n    if (timer) {\n      clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n    setSearchValue(\"\");\n    setSearchTermOnChange(\"\");\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox\u003e\n      \u003cTextField\n        size=\"small\"\n        value={searchValue}\n        InputProps={{\n          startAdornment: (\n            \u003cInputAdornment position=\"start\" sx={{ p: 0 }}\u003e\n              \u003cIconButton sx={{ p: 0 }}\u003e\n                \u003cSearch size={18} /\u003e\n              \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n            \u003c/InputAdornment\u003e\n          ),\n          endAdornment: searchValue ? (\n            \u003cInputAdornment position=\"end\" sx={{ p: 0 }}\u003e\n              \u003cIconButton sx={{ p: 0 }} onClick={handleClear} aria-label=\"Clear search\"\u003e\n                \u003cX size={18} /\u003e\n              \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n            \u003c/InputAdornment\u003e\n          ) : null,\n        }}\n        placeholder={searchBoxLabel}\n        onChange={handleChange}\n        sx={(theme) =\u003e ({\n          minWidth: 400,\n          backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.secondary,\n          \"\u0026 .MuiInputBase-input\": {\n            fontSize: \"0.9rem\",\n            padding: 2,\n            \"\u0026::placeholder\": {\n              fontSize: \"0.9rem\",\n              opacity: 0.6,\n            },\n          },\n          \"\u0026 .MuiOutlinedInput-notchedOutline\": {\n            borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n          },\n          mr: 2,\n        })}\n      \u003e\u003c/TextField\u003e\n    \u003c/Box\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);\n\nexport const ThemeProvider = memo(function ThemeProvider({ children }: PropsWithChildren) {\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cCssBaseline /\u003e\n      \u003cMUIThemeProvider theme={mainTheme}\u003e{children}\u003c/MUIThemeProvider\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  );\n});",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "const mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);"
          },

            "lineNumber": 93

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  Box,\n  Paper,\n  Typography,\n  Button,\n  TextField,\n  Chip,\n  Card,\n  CardContent,\n  Table,\n  TableBody,\n  TableCell,\n  TableContainer,\n  TableHead,\n  TableRow,\n  Select,\n  MenuItem,\n  FormControl,\n  InputLabel,\n  Tabs,\n  Tab,\n  Dialog,\n  DialogTitle,\n  DialogContent,\n  DialogContentText,\n  DialogActions,\n  Tooltip,\n  IconButton,\n  Menu,\n  Skeleton,\n  InputAdornment,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport {\n  Play as PlayArrow,\n  Square as Stop,\n  RefreshCw as Refresh,\n  Clock as Schedule,\n  CheckCircle,\n  XCircle as Cancel,\n  MoreVertical as MoreVert,\n  Search,\n  FileText as Description,\n  Calendar as CalendarToday,\n  Database as Storage,\n  Mail,\n  Trash2 as Delete,\n  Wrench as Build,\n  Languages as Language,\n  TrendingUp,\n  PlayCircle as PlayCircleOutline,\n  ToggleRight as ToggleOn,\n  ToggleLeft as ToggleOff,\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { useRequestContext } from \"@providers/request-provider\";\nimport type { TaskDetailsDto, TaskExecutionLogDetailsDto } from \"lib/network/swagger-client\";\nimport { getTaskMetadata, getTaskCategory, describeCron, formatDuration } from \"../utils\";\nimport { getCategoryColor } from \"../utils\";\nimport type { TaskCategory } from \"../types\";\n\nconst categoryIcons: Record\u003cTaskCategory, React.ReactNode\u003e = {\n  \"data-sync\": \u003cStorage sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  maintenance: \u003cBuild sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  reporting: \u003cDescription sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  enrichment: \u003cTrendingUp sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  email: \u003cMail sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  cleanup: \u003cDelete sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n  other: \u003cLanguage sx={{ fontSize: 16 }} /\u003e,\n};\n\nexport const TasksList = () =\u003e {\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import React from \"react\";\nimport Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport Tabs from \"@mui/material/Tabs\";\nimport Tab from \"@mui/material/Tab\";\nimport Select from \"@mui/material/Select\";\nimport MenuItem from \"@mui/material/MenuItem\";\nimport FormControl from \"@mui/material/FormControl\";\nimport InputLabel from \"@mui/material/InputLabel\";\nimport Chip from \"@mui/material/Chip\";\nimport Stack from \"@mui/material/Stack\";\nimport Skeleton from \"@mui/material/Skeleton\";\nimport List from \"@mui/material/List\";\nimport ListItem from \"@mui/material/ListItem\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport ListItemIcon from \"@mui/material/ListItemIcon\";\nimport ToggleButton from \"@mui/material/ToggleButton\";\nimport ToggleButtonGroup from \"@mui/material/ToggleButtonGroup\";\nimport Button from _**Agent (default)**_


## Modernization changes

### 1. Typography
- Updated font stack with system fonts
- Improved heading hierarchy (h1–h6)
- Better line heights and letter spacing
- Consistent font weights

### 2. Color palette
- Modern slate-based grays (Tailwind-inspired)
- Updated semantic colors (success, error, warning, info)
- Improved contrast ratios
- Consistent color naming

### 3. Shadows
- Subtle, modern shadows
- Replaced heavy shadows with lighter ones
- Better depth hierarchy

### 4. Component defaults
- Buttons: rounded corners (8px), no text transform, better hover states
- Cards: 12px border radius, subtle borders, modern shadows
- TextFields: 8px border radius, better hover states
- Chips: 6px border radius
- Dialogs: 16px border radius, modern shadows
- DataGrid: updated styling with better borders and hover states

### 5. Shape
- Default border radius: 8px
- Consistent rounded corners across components

### 6. Spacing
- Maintained 4px spacing unit
- Better padding defaults

## Next steps (optional)

1. Gradually migrate styled components to `sx` prop
2. Add dark mode support
3. Use CSS variables for dynamic theming
4. Update component usage to leverage new defaults

The theme is now more modern and consistent. Components will automatically use the new styling. Should I help modernize specific components or add dark mode support?

---

_**User**_

2 things to fix: in nav menu I have quite unaccsesible and not pretty styles

in addition for card i have hover state, that I don't need

---

_**Agent (default)**_


## Fixed issues

### 1. Navigation menu accessibility and styling

**Before:**
- Low contrast: light blue text on blue background (selected state)
- Dark hover state with low contrast
- Icons too light (using subtitle2 color)

**After:**
- Better contrast: primary text color for default state
- Light grey hover (`palette.grey[100]`) instead of dark
- Selected state: primary color text on light primary background with bold font
- Icons use proper text colors with hover feedback
- Improved accessibility and readability

### 2. Card hover states removed

**Removed from:**
- Global `MuiCard` component (theme level)
- Dashboard metric tiles
- Dashboard cards

Cards no longer change on hover; they remain static.

## Changes made

1. `src/components/side-bar/index.styled.tsx`:
   - Updated `SidebarLink` colors for better contrast
   - Changed hover from dark to light grey
   - Improved selected state styling
   - Fixed icon colors

2. `src/providers/theme-provider.tsx`:
   - Disabled card hover effects globally

3. `src/features/dashboard/index.tsx`:
   - Removed hover boxShadow from cards
   - Removed hover-only transitions

The navigation menu should now be more accessible and visually consistent, and cards no longer have hover effects.

---

<summary>Tool use: **read_lints**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


Fixed the Emotion error. The issue was using a component selector (`${SidebarLink}:hover &`), which requires the Emotion babel plugin.

## Fixed

1. Removed the component selector from `ListItemIconStyled` that referenced `SidebarLink`
2. Used a class-based approach with the `sx` prop instead:
   - Added `className="sidebar-icon"` to `ListItemIconStyled`
   - Used `"&:hover .sidebar-icon"` in the `sx` prop of `SidebarLink`
3. Fixed TypeScript errors by properly typing the styled components

The navigation menu should now work without the Emotion compilation error. The hover effect on icons is handled via the `sx` prop using a standard CSS class selector, which doesn't require the Emotion babel plugin.

The error should be resolved. Refresh your browser to see the changes.

---

_**User**_

I also want to remove hover state from paper

        "contents": "export const ImageSelectionDialog: React.FC\u003cImageSelectionDialogProps\u003e = \n\n                {imageItems.length \u003e 0 ? (\n                  \u003cBox\u003e\n                    \u003cTypography variant=\"subtitle2\" gutterBottom\u003e\n                      Images ({imageItems.length})\n                    \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                    \u003cGrid container spacing={2}\u003e\n                      {imageItems.map((item) =\u003e (\n                        \u003cGrid size={{ xs: 6, sm: 4, md: 3 }} key={item.id}\u003e\n                          \u003cPaper\n                            elevation={selectedItem?.id === item.id ? 3 : 1}\n                            sx={{\n                              position: \"relative\",\n                              cursor: \"pointer\",\n                              border:\n                                selectedItem?.id === item.id ? \"2px solid\" : \"1px solid #e0e0e0\",\n                              borderColor:\n                                selectedItem?.id === item.id ? \"primary.main\" : \"#e0e0e0\",\n                              borderRadius: 2,\n                              overflow: \"hidden\",\n                              transition: \"all 0.2s\",\n                              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                                elevation: 3,\n                                transform: \"translateY(-2px)\",\n                              },\n                            }}\n                            onClick={() =\u003e handleImageSelect(item)}\n                          \u003e\n                            \u003cBox\n                              sx={{\n                                position: \"relative\"\n                      )\n;",

            "text": "                    \u003cGrid container spacing={2}\u003e"
          },

            "text": "                      {imageItems.map((item) =\u003e ("
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "                          \u003cPaper"

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "                            sx={{"
          },
          {

            "text": "                              position: \"relative\","
          },

          },

        "contents": "const ItemCard = \n\n  if (item.updatedAt) {\n    metaDateLabel = \"Updated:\";\n    metaDateValue = new Date(item.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString();\n  } else if (item.createdAt) {\n    metaDateLabel = \"Created:\";\n    metaDateValue = new Date(item.createdAt).toLocaleDateString();\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCard\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        height: 414,\n        borderRadius: 3,\n        overflow: \"hidden\",\n        boxShadow: 1,\n        transition: \"box-shadow 0.2s\",\n        \"\u0026:hover\": { boxShadow: 6 },\n      }}\n      variant=\"outlined\"\n    \u003e\n      \u003cBox\n        sx={{\n          position: \"relative\",\n          height: 180,\n          width: \"100%\",\n          overflow: \"hidden\",\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        {item.type \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cChip\n            label={idToDisplayName(item.type)}\n            size=\"small\"\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              top: 16,\n              left: 16,\n              zIndex: 2,\n              fontWeight: 700,\n              fontSize: 12,\n              height: 24,\n              borderRadius: 1,\n              backgroundColor: getTypeColor(item.type, theme),\n              color: theme.palette.getContrastText(getTypeColor(item.type, theme)),\n              boxShadow: 1,\n            }}\n          /\u003e\n        )}\n        {/* Content status chip */}\n        \u003cTooltip title={publishedTooltipTitle} disableHoverListener={!publishedTooltipTitle} arrow\u003e\n          \u003cChip\n            label={contentStatus.status}\n            color={contentStatus.color}\n            variant=\"filled\"\n            size=\"small\"\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              top: 16,\n              right: 16,\n              zIndex: 2,\n              fontWeight: 700,\n              fontSize: 12,\n              height: 24,\n              borderRadius: 1,\n              boxShadow: 1,\n            }}\n          /\u003e\n        \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n        \u003cCardMedia\n          component=\"img\"\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import styled from \"@emotion/styled\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\n\nexport const DataTableContainer = styled(Paper)&#96;\n  flex-grow: 1;\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders {\n    --DataGrid-t-header-background-base: #f8faff;\n  }\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader {\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-row:hover {\n    background-color: #fafcff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    font-size: 20px;\n    color: #71717a;\n  }\n\n  .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff;\n  }\n\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root,\n  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.MuiCheckbox-indeterminate .MuiSvgIcon-root {\n    color: #3878ff !important;\n  }\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import styled from \"@emotion/styled\";"

          },

            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  }"
          },

            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    color: #71717a;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  \u0026\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-row:hover {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    background-color: #fafcff;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  .MuiCheckbox-root .MuiSvgIcon-root {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    font-size: 20px;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    color: #71717a;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    color: #3878ff;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.Mui-checked .MuiSvgIcon-root,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  .MuiDataGrid-columnHeader .MuiCheckbox-root.MuiCheckbox-indeterminate .MuiSvgIcon-root {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    color: #3878ff !important;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "&#96;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "export const ActionButtonContainer = styled(\"div\")"
          },

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": ";"

        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Card: React.FC\u003cCardProps\u003e = ({ title, subtitle, action, children }) =\u003e (\n  \u003cPaper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      height: \"100%\",\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n      borderRadius: 2,\n      borderColor: (t) =\u003e t.palette.divider,\n    }}\n  \u003e\n    {(title || action) \u0026\u0026 (\n      \u003cStack direction=\"row\" alignItems=\"center\" justifyContent=\"space-between\" sx={{ mb: 1 }}\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          {title \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"h6\" sx={{ lineHeight: 1.2 }}\u003e\n              {title}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n          {subtitle \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n              {subtitle}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        {action}\n      \u003c/Stack\u003e\n    )}\n    \u003cBox\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        flexDirection: \"column\",\n        flex: 1,\n        minHeight: 0,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      {children}\n    \u003c/Box\u003e\n  \u003c/Paper\u003e\n);\n\ntype LineChartPoint = { label: string; a: number; b: number };",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export const ImageSelectionDialog: React.FC\u003cImageSelectionDialogProps\u003e = \n\n          \u003cGrid size={{ xs: 12 }}\u003e\n            {loading ? (\n              \u003cBox display=\"flex\" justifyContent=\"center\" p={4}\u003e\n                \u003cCircularProgress /\u003e\n              \u003c/Box\u003e\n            ) : (\n              \u003cBox sx={{ maxHeight: 500, overflowY: \"auto\" }}\u003e\n                {/* Folders */}\n                {!search \u0026\u0026 folderItems.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 (\n                  \u003cBox mb={2}\u003e\n                    \u003cTypography variant=\"subtitle2\" gutterBottom\u003e\n                      Folders\n                    \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                    \u003cGrid container spacing={2}\u003e\n                      {folderItems.map((item) =\u003e (\n                        \u003cGrid size={{ xs: 6, sm: 4, md: 3 }} key={item.id}\u003e\n                          \u003cPaper\n                            elevation={1}\n                            sx={{\n                              position: \"relative\",\n                              cursor: \"pointer\",\n                              bgcolor: \"#FFF8E1\",\n                              border: \"1px solid #FFE082\",\n                              borderRadius: 2,\n                              overflow: \"hidden\",\n                              transition: \"all 0.2s\",\n                              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                                elevation: 3,\n                                bgcolor: \"#FFF59D\",\n                                transform: \"translateY(-2px)\",\n                              },\n                            }}\n                            onClick={() =\u003e handleFolderClick(item)}\n                          \u003e\n                            \u003cBox\n                              sx={{\n                                display: \"flex\"\n                      )\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const NoRecordsDisplay: React.FC\u003cNoRecordsDisplayProps\u003e = \nconst getIcon = \n\n    return \u003cFileX size={48} /\u003e;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox\n      sx={{\n        display: \"flex\",\n        justifyContent: \"center\",\n        alignItems: \"center\",\n        minHeight: 300,\n        py: 6,\n        px: 2,\n        opacity: visible ? 1 : 0,\n        transition: \"opacity 0.3s ease\",\n        position: \"relative\",\n        zIndex: 10,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cPaper\n        elevation={0}\n        sx={{\n          p: 6,\n          textAlign: \"center\",\n          backgroundColor: \"grey.50\",\n          borderRadius: 3,\n          border: \"2px dashed\",\n          borderColor: \"grey.300\",\n          maxWidth: 500,\n          width: \"100%\",\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cBox\n          sx={{\n            display: \"flex\",\n            justifyContent: \"center\",\n            mb: 3,\n            color: \"grey.400\",\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          {getIcon()}\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n        \u003cTypography\n          variant=\"h6\"\n          sx={{\n            mb: 2,\n            fontWeight: 600,\n            color: \"grey.700\",\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          {message || \"No Content Found\"}\n        \u003c/Typography\u003e\n\n        \u003cTypography\n          variant=\"body1\"\n          sx={{\n            mb: hasActiveFilters ? 3 : 0,\n            color: \"grey.600\",\n            lineHeight: 1.6,\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          {getContextualMessage()}\n        \u003c/Typography\u003e\n\n        {hasActiveFilters \u0026\u0026 onClearFilters \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cButton\n            variant=\"outlined\"\n            startIcon={\u003cRefreshCw size={16} /\u003e}\n            onClick={onClearFilters}\n            sx={{\n              mt: 1,\n              borderColor: \"grey.400\",\n              color: \"grey.700\",\n              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                borderColor: \"primary.main\",\n                backgroundColor: \"primary.50\",\n              },\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            Clear All Filters\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/Paper\u003e\n    \u003c/Box\u003e\n  );\n};\n\nexport default NoRecordsDisplay;",

          },
          {

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const themeOptions: ThemeOptions = \n\n  palette: {\n    mode: \"light\",\n    primary: {\n      main: \"#3878FF\",\n      light: \"#6B9AFF\",\n      dark: \"#2854B2\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    secondary: {\n      main: \"#0F172A\",\n      light: \"#1E293B\",\n      dark: \"#020617\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    text: {\n      primary: \"#0F172A\",\n      secondary: \"#64748B\",\n      disabled: \"#94A3B8\",\n    },\n    info: {\n      main: \"#3B82F6\",\n      light: \"#60A5FA\",\n      dark: \"#2563EB\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    success: {\n      main: \"#10B981\",\n      light: \"#34D399\",\n      dark: \"#059669\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    error: {\n      main: \"#EF4444\",\n      light: \"#F87171\",\n      dark: \"#DC2626\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    warning: {\n      main: \"#F59E0B\",\n      light: \"#FBBF24\",\n      dark: \"#D97706\",\n      contrastText: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    },\n    background: {\n      default: \"#FFFFFF\",\n      paper: \"#FFFFFF\",\n      primary: \"#F8FAFC\",\n      primaryHover: \"#F1F5F9\",\n      secondary: \"#FFFFFF\",\n    } as any,\n    grey: {\n      50: \"#F8FAFC\",\n      100: \"#F1F5F9\",\n      200: \"#E2E8F0\",\n      300: \"#CBD5E1\",\n      400: \"#94A3B8\",\n      500: \"#64748B\",\n      600: \"#475569\",\n      700: \"#334155\",\n      800: \"#1E293B\",\n      900: \"#0F172A\",\n    },\n  },\n  shadows: [\n    \"none\",\n    \"0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05)\",\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const ValidationStatusBubble: React.FC\u003cValidationStatusBubbleProps\u003e = \n\n      \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Error state - show prominent error indicator (similar to preview error style)\n  return (\n    \u003cTooltip title={renderTooltipContent()} placement=\"left\"\u003e\n      \u003cPaper\n        elevation={6}\n        sx={{\n          position: \"absolute\",\n          bottom: 16,\n          right: previewPaneVisible ? \"calc(50% + 24px)\" : 16, // Avoid preview pane\n          zIndex: 1000,\n          borderRadius: \"8px\",\n          overflow: \"hidden\",\n          border: \"2px solid #dc3545\",\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cBox\n          sx={{\n            display: \"flex\",\n            alignItems: \"center\",\n            gap: 1.5,\n            px: 2.5,\n            py: 1.5,\n            backgroundColor: \"#f8d7da\",\n            color: \"#721c24\",\n            borderLeft: \"4px solid #dc3545\",\n            minWidth: \"120px\",\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          \u003cBox sx={{ color: \"error.main\" }}\u003e\n            {validation.error ? getErrorIcon(validation.error.type, 20) : \u003cAlertCircle size={20} /\u003e}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n          \u003cBox sx={{ flex: 1 }}\u003e\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" sx={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\", fontWeight: 600, mb: 0.5 }}\u003e\n              Syntax Error\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" sx={{ fontSize: \"0.7rem\", opacity: 0.9 }}\u003e\n              {getLanguageLabel(validation.error?.type || format)}\n              {validation.error?.line \u0026\u0026 &#96; • Line ${validation.error.line}&#96;}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003c/Paper\u003e\n    \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n  );\n};\n\nexport default ValidationStatusBubble;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "const ValidationStatusBubble: React.FC\u003cValidationStatusBubbleProps\u003e = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179

            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "      \u003c/Tooltip\u003e"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "  // Error state - show prominent error indicator (similar to preview error style)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "  return ("
          },

            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    \u003cTooltip title={renderTooltipContent()} placement=\"left\"\u003e"

            "lineNumber": 187,

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "          borderRadius: \"8px\","

          },

            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "            {validation.error ? getErrorIcon(validation.error.type, 20) : \u003cAlertCircle size={20} /\u003e}"

            "text": "              {validation.error?.line \u0026\u0026 &#96; • Line ${validation.error.line}&#96;}"

        "contents": "const ItemCard = \n\n        \u003cCardMedia\n          component=\"img\"\n          image={getContentCoverImageUrl(item.coverImageUrl)}\n          alt={item.coverImageAlt || cubic-bezier(.4,2,.6,1)\",\n            \"\u0026:hover\": { transform: \"scale(1.05)\" },\n          }}\n        /\u003e\n        {/* Future: badges/overlays can be placed here */}\n         "contents": "const Dashboard: React.FC = \n topContent \u0026\u0026 topContent.length \u003e 0 ? (\n                  \u003cList dense\u003e\n                    {topContent.map((c) =\u003e {\n                      const toHref =\n                        typeof c.contentId === \"number\"\n                          ? &#96;${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.content)}/${getEditFormRoute(\n                              c.contentId\n                            )}&#96;\n                          : undefined;\n                      return (\n                        \u003cListItem\n                          key={c.contentId}\n                          sx={{\n                            px: 0,\n                            cursor: \"pointer\",\n                            \"\u0026:hover .list-link-text\": { textDecoration: \"underline\" },\n                          }}\n                          {...(toHref ? ({ component: GhostLink, to: toHref } as const) : {})}\n                        \u003e\n                          \u003cListItemIcon\u003e\n                            \u003cFileText size={18} /\u003e\n                          \u003c/ListItemIcon\u003e\n                          \u003cListItemText\n                            primary={c.title}\n                            slotProps={{\n                              primary: {\n                                color: \"primary\",\n                                className: \"list-link-text\",\n                              },\n                            }}\n                            secondary={\n                              \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\"\u003e\n                                {typeof c.commentCount === \"number\"\n                                  ? &#96;${c.commentCount} comments&#96;\n                                  : \"\"}\n                              \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                            }\n                          /\u003e\n                        \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n                      );\n                    })}\n                  \u003c/List\u003e\n                ) : (\n                  \u003cEmptyState /\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/Card\u003e\n            \u003c/Grid\u003e\n          )}\n\n          {\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Grid from \"@mui/material/Grid\";\nimport ListItem from \"@mui/material/ListItem\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport Paper from \"@mui/material/Paper\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\n\nexport const ActionsContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const LeftContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n&#96;;",

        "contents": "export const themeOptions: ThemeOptions = \n\",\n        },\n      },\n    },\n    MuiDataGrid: {\n      styleOverrides: {\n        root: {\n          border: \"none\",\n          \"\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-columnHeaders\": {\n            backgroundColor: \"#F8FAFC\",\n            borderBottom: \"1px solid #E2E8F0\",\n          },\n          \"\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-cell\": {\n            borderBottom: \"1px solid #F1F5F9\",\n          },\n          \"\u0026 .MuiDataGrid-row:hover\": {\n            backgroundColor: \"#F8FAFC\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n    },\n  },\n} as ThemeOptions;\n\nconst mainTheme = createTheme(themeOptions);",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentSortPopup: React.FC\u003cProps\u003e = ({\n  anchorEl,\n  open,\n  selectedField,\n  direction,\n  onClose,\n  onChangeField,\n  onToggleDirection,\n}) =\u003e {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  return (\n    \u003cPopover\n      open={open}\n      anchorEl={anchorEl}\n      onClose={onClose}\n      anchorOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"bottom\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      transformOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"top\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      PaperProps={{\n        sx: { minWidth: 100, p: 0, borderRadius: 2, mt: 1 },\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cStack spacing={1}\u003e\n        {SORT_OPTIONS.map((option) =\u003e (\n          \u003cButton\n            key={option.value}\n            fullWidth\n            color=\"secondary\"\n            variant=\"text\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e {\n              onChangeField(option.value);\n              onClose();\n            }}\n            sx={{\n              fontSize: \"14px\",\n              px: 3,\n              py: 1,\n              backgroundColor:\n                selectedField === option.value ? theme.palette.primary.light : undefined,\n              borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n              color: theme.palette.text.secondary,\n              textTransform: \"none\",\n              justifyContent: \"flex-start\",\n              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n              },\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cBox display=\"flex\" alignItems=\"center\" width=\"100%\"\u003e\n              {selectedField === option.value \u0026\u0026 \u003cCheck size={14} style={{ marginRight: 4 }} /\u003e}\n              \u003cspan\u003e{option.label}\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003c/Box\u003e\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        ))}\n        \u003cDivider sx={{ my: 1 }} /\u003e\n        \u003cButton\n          color=\"secondary\"\n          variant=\"text\"\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const MediaManagement = \n(item) =\u003e {\n\n                  \u003cBox\n                    sx={{\n                      width: \"100%\",\n                      aspectRatio: \"1 / 1\",\n                      position: \"relative\",\n                      overflow: \"hidden\",\n                      bgcolor: isFolder ? \"#FFF8E1\" : \"#F5F5F5\",\n                      borderBottom: \"1px solid #f0f0f0\",\n                      display: \"flex\",\n                      alignItems: \"center\",\n                      justifyContent: \"center\",\n                    }}\n                  \u003e\n                    {/* Show image preview for images, icon for others */}\n                    {type === \"image\" ? (\n                      \u003cBox\n                        sx={{\n                          position: \"absolute\",\n                          top: 0,\n                          left: 0,\n                          width: \"100%\",\n                          height: \"100%\",\n                          transition: \"transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(.4,2,.6,1)\",\n                          \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                            transform: \"scale(1.05)\",\n                          },\n                        }}\n                      \u003e\n                        \u003cimg\n                          src={\n                            buildAbsoluteUrlWithCacheBust(\n                              item.location,\n                              item.size,\n                              item.updatedAt\n                            ) || \"/images/placeholder.svg\"\n                          }\n                          alt={item.name}\n                          style={{\n                            width: \"100%\",\n                            height: \"100%\",\n                            objectFit: \"cover\",\n                            display: \"block\",\n                            borderRadius: 0,\n                            background: \"#fafafa\",\n                          }}\n                          loading=\"lazy\"\n                        /\u003e\n                      \u003c/Box\u003e\n                    ) : (\n                      \u003cBox\n                        sx=\n          }\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Dashboard: React.FC = \n\n\n          {availability.cms.recentContent \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cGrid size={{ xs: 12, md: 4 }}\u003e\n              \u003cCard title=\"Recent Content\" subtitle=\"Last 5 items\"\u003e\n                {recentContentLoading ? (\n                  \u003cSectionLoader /\u003e\n                ) : recentContentError ? (\n                  \u003cTypography color=\"error\" variant=\"body2\"\u003e\n                    {recentContentError}\n                  \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                ) : recentContent \u0026\u0026 recentContent.length \u003e 0 ? (\n                  \u003c\u003e\n                    \u003cList dense sx={{ mb: 2 }}\u003e\n                      {recentContent.map((c) =\u003e {\n                        const toHref =\n                          typeof c.id === \"number\"\n                            ? &#96;${getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.content)}/${getEditFormRoute(c.id)}&#96;\n                            : undefined;\n                        return (\n                          \u003cListItem\n                            key={c.id}\n                            sx={{\n                              px: 0,\n                              cursor: \"pointer\",\n                              \"\u0026:hover .list-link-text\": { textDecoration: \"underline\" },\n                            }}\n                            {...(toHref ? ({ component: GhostLink, to: toHref } as const) : {})}\n                          \u003e\n                            \u003cListItemIcon\u003e\n                              \u003cFileText size={18} /\u003e\n                            \u003c/ListItemIcon\u003e\n                            \u003cListItemText\n                              primary={c.title}\n                              slotProps={{\n                                primary: {\n                                  color: \"primary\",\n                                  className: \"list-link-text\",\n                                },\n                              }}\n                              secondary={\u003cTypography variant=\"body2\"\u003e{c.author ?? \"\"}\u003c/Typography\u003e}\n                            /\u003e\n                          \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n                        );\n                      })}\n                    \u003c/List\u003e\n;",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  background-color: #1976d2;\n  color: white;\n}\n\n/* Error highlighting for frontmatter issues */\n.error-line {\n  border-bottom: 1px dashed red;\n}\n\n/* Override default MDX Editor styles to match application theme */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor-focus-ring {\n  outline: 2px solid #1976d2;\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n/* Preview panel styling */\n.mdx-editor-preview-panel {\n  border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  background-color: #fff;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-header {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  min-height: 40px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-title {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: #333;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-refresh-btn {\n  padding: 4px;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  color: #666;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-preview-refresh-btn:hover {\n  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);\n}\n\n/* Responsive adjustments */\n@media (max-width: 900px) {\n  .mdx-editor-new {\n    min-height: 300px;\n  }\n\n  .mdx-editor-content {\n    min-height: 300px;\n    padding: 12px;\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const SidebarLink = styled(ListItemButton, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =\u003e prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\u003c{ isCollapsed?: boolean }\u003e(({ theme, isCollapsed }) =\u003e &#96;\n  border-radius: ${theme.spacing(2)};\n  height: ${theme.spacing(9)};\n  margin-top: ${theme.spacing(1)};\n  margin-left: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"0\"};\n  margin-right: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"10px\"};\n  color: ${theme.palette.text.primary};\n  min-width: ${isCollapsed ? \"56px\" : \"auto\"};\n  justify-content: ${isCollapsed ? \"center\" : \"flex-start\"};\n  padding-left: ${isCollapsed ? \"0\" : theme.spacing(2)};\n  background-color: transparent;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n  \n  :hover {\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.grey[100]};\n  }\n\n  \u0026.Mui-selected {\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    font-weight: 600;\n    \n    :hover {\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    }\n  }\n&#96;);\n\nexport const SidebarLinkText = styled(ListItemText, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =\u003e prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/* MDX Editor Container */\n.mdx-editor-container {\n  height: 100%;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Main MDX Editor Styling */\n.mdx-editor-new {\n  height: 100%;\n  width: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-editor {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n/* Content area with proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  overflow-x: hidden;\n  min-height: 400px;\n  font-family: \"Helvetica Neue\", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  padding: 16px;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 144px);\n}\n\n/* Ensure prosemirror editor has proper scrolling */\n.mdx-editor-new .ProseMirror {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: none !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n/* CodeMirror editor scrolling for source mode */\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-editor {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 244px) !important;\n  min-height: 400px;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .cm-scroller {\n  overflow-y: auto !important;\n  overflow-x: auto !important;\n}\n\n/* Toolbar customization */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] {\n  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;\n  padding: 8px 16px;\n  background-color: #fafafa;\n}\n\n/* Ensure diff/source toggle buttons are visible */\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"diff-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[data-testid^=\"source-\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"view\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"diff\"],\n.mdx-editor-new [data-toolbar] button[aria-label*=\"source\"] {\n  display: inline-flex !important;\n  visibility: visible !important;\n  opacity: 1 !important;\n}\n\n/* Style the diff/source mode toggle buttons */\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button {\n  margin-right: 8px;\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  background-color: #fff;\n  border: 1px solid #ddd;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button:hover {\n  background-color: #f5f5f5;\n}\n\n.mdx-editor-new .mdx-diff-source-toggle-wrapper button[data-active=\"true\"] {\n  ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const MetricTile: React.FC\u003c{\n  label: string;\n  value?: number | string | null;\n  valueFormatter?: (n: number) =\u003e string;\n  changePct?: number | null;\n  loading?: boolean;\n}\u003e = ({ label, value, valueFormatter, changePct, loading }) =\u003e (\n  \u003cPaper\n    variant=\"outlined\"\n    sx={{\n      p: 6.25,\n      minHeight: 140,\n      display: \"flex\",\n      flexDirection: \"column\",\n      gap: 1.25,\n    }}\n  \u003e\n    \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}\u003e\n      {label}\n    \u003c/Typography\u003e\n    {loading ? (\n      \u003cBox\u003e\n        \u003cSkeleton width={80} height={32} /\u003e\n        \u003cSkeleton width={120} height={20} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    ) : (\n      \u003c\u003e\n        \u003cBox\u003e\n          {typeof value === \"number\" ? (\n            \u003cNumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /\u003e\n          ) : (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"h4\"\u003e{value ?? \"—\"}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n        \u003cStack direction=\"row\" spacing={1} alignItems=\"center\"\u003e\n          \u003cChangeChip pct={changePct ?? undefined} /\u003e\n          {changePct !== null \u0026\u0026 changePct !== undefined \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n              {\"vs. previous period\"}\n            \u003c/Typography\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Stack\u003e\n      \u003c/\u003e\n    )}\n  \u003c/Paper\u003e\n);\n\nconst SectionLoader = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cStack gap={1}\u003e\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,

          },

            "lineNumber": 288,

            "text": "      p: 6.25,"

          },

            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "      flexDirection: \"column\","
          },

            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "      gap: 1.25,"
          },

            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "    }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "  \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "    \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\" color=\"text.secondary\" sx={{ mb: 0.5 }}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "      {label}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "    \u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "    {loading ? ("

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "        \u003cSkeleton width={80} height={32} /\u003e"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,

          },

            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "        \u003cBox\u003e"
          },

            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "          {typeof value === \"number\" ? ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "            \u003cNumberBadge value={value} formatter={valueFormatter} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,

          },

            "text": "            \u003cTypography variant=\"h4\"\u003e{value ?? \"—\"}\u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "          )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "        \u003c/Box\u003e"
          },

          },
          {

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Dashboard: React.FC = \n(c) =\u003e {\n\n                      return (\n                        \u003cListItem\n                          key={c.id}\n                          sx={{\n                            px: 0,\n                            cursor: \"pointer\",\n                            \"\u0026:hover .list-link-text\": { textDecoration: \"underline\" },\n                          }}\n                          {...(toHref ? ({ component: GhostLink, to: toHref } as const) : {})}\n                        \u003e\n                          \u003cListItemIcon\u003e\n                            \u003cMessageSquare size={18} /\u003e\n                          \u003c/ListItemIcon\u003e\n                          \u003cListItemText\n                            primary={&#96;${c.user ?? \"Unknown\"}&#96;}\n                            slotProps={{\n                              primary: {\n                                color: \"primary\",\n                                className: \"list-link-text\",\n                              },\n                            }}\n                            secondary={\n                              \u003c\u003e\n                                \u003cTypography variant=\"body2\"\u003e{c.comment}\u003c/Typography\u003e\n                                {c.article \u0026\u0026 (\n                                  \u003cTypography variant=\"caption\" color=\"text.secondary\"\u003e\n                                    {c.article}\n                                  \u003c/Typography\u003e\n                                )}\n                              \u003c/\u003e\n                            }\n                          /\u003e\n                        \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n                      );\n                    })}\n                  \u003c/List\u003e\n                ) : (\n                  \u003cEmptyState /\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/Card\u003e\n            \u003c/Grid\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Grid\u003e\n      ) : (\n        \u003cEmptyState message=\"No dashboard tiles available\" /\u003e\n      )}\n    \u003c/Box\u003e\n  );\n};\n\n// Simple icons for list bullets\nconst Bullet = () =\u003e\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CommentSortPopup: React.FC\u003cProps\u003e = ({\n  anchorEl,\n  open,\n  selectedField,\n  direction,\n  onClose,\n  onChangeField,\n  onToggleDirection,\n}) =\u003e {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  return (\n    \u003cPopover\n      open={open}\n      anchorEl={anchorEl}\n      onClose={onClose}\n      anchorOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"bottom\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      transformOrigin={{\n        vertical: \"top\",\n        horizontal: \"left\",\n      }}\n      PaperProps={{\n        sx: { minWidth: 100, p: 0, borderRadius: 2, mt: 1 },\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cStack spacing={1}\u003e\n        {SORT_OPTIONS.map((option) =\u003e (\n          \u003cButton\n            key={option.value}\n            fullWidth\n            color=\"secondary\"\n            variant=\"text\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e {\n              onChangeField(option.value);\n              onClose();\n            }}\n            sx={{\n              fontSize: \"14px\",\n              px: 3,\n              py: 1,\n              backgroundColor:\n                selectedField === option.value ? theme.palette.primary.light : undefined,\n              borderColor: \"#E4E4E7\",\n              color: theme.palette.text.secondary,\n              textTransform: \"none\",\n              justifyContent: \"flex-start\",\n              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                backgroundColor: theme.palette.background.primaryHover,\n              },\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cBox display=\"flex\" alignItems=\"center\" width=\"100%\"\u003e\n              {selectedField === option.value \u0026\u0026 \u003cCheck size={14} style={{ marginRight: 4 }} /\u003e}\n              \u003cspan\u003e{option.label}\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003c/Box\u003e\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        ))}\n        \u003cDivider sx={{ my: 1 }} /\u003e\n        \u003cButton\n          color=\"secondary\"\n          variant=\"text\"\n;",

_**Agent (default)**_


Removed all Paper hover states. Summary:

## Removed Paper hover states

### 1. Global theme override (`src/providers/theme-provider.tsx`)
- Added global `MuiPaper` override to disable hover effects
- Prevents hover boxShadow, transform, and elevation changes

### 2. Media feature (`src/features/media/index.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { boxShadow: 6 }` from Paper components
- Removed transition that was only for hover

### 3. Image selection dialog (`src/components/image-selection-dialog/image-selection-dialog.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { elevation: 3, transform: "translateY(-2px)" }`
- Removed transition

### 4. Content list (`src/features/content/content-list.tsx`)
- Removed `"&:hover": { boxShadow: 6 }` from Card components
- Removed transition

All Paper components (including Cards, which extend Paper) no longer have hover effects. They remain static on hover. The global theme override ensures any new Paper components won't have hover effects by default.

---

- Selected icon: `primary.main` (blue)

_**Agent (default)**_


Updated the hover state:

## Changes Made

1. **Hover state** (`SidebarLink`):
   - Background: changes to `primary.light` (light blue)
   - Text color: uses `primary.contrastText` (white)
   - Icon color: uses `primary.contrastText` (white) via sx prop

2. **Selected state**:
   - Background: `primary.light` (light blue)
   - Text color: `primary.contrastText` (white)
   - Icon color: `primary.contrastText` (white)

On hover, only the background changes; text and icon use the contrast color (white) for consistency with the selected state. The icon color change is handled via the `sx` prop with a class selector to avoid the Emotion component selector issue.

_**Agent (default)**_


Updated the hover states:

## Updated hover states

### 1. Non-selected items (hover)
- Background: `grey[50]` (lighter than before)
- Text: `text.primary` (dark)
- Icon: `text.primary` (dark)

### 2. Selected items (hover)
- Background: `primary.main` (darker than selected state)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white, unchanged)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white, unchanged)

## Visual hierarchy

1. Default: transparent background
2. Hover (non-selected): light grey (`grey[50]`)
3. Selected: light blue (`primary.light`)
4. Hover (selected): darker blue (`primary.main`)

This makes the selected item hover more prominent and the non-selected hover more subtle.

_**Agent (default)**_


Fixed the focus state. Added:

## Focus state fixes

### 1. **Non-selected items (focus)**
- Outline: 2px solid `primary.main` (blue)
- Background: `primary.light` (light blue)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white) via sx prop

### 2. **Selected items (focus)**
- Outline: 2px solid `primary.dark` (darker blue)
- Background: `primary.main` (unchanged)
- Text: `primary.contrastText` (white)
- Icon: `primary.contrastText` (white)

### 3. **Focus-visible support**
- Added `:focus` and `:focus-visible` for keyboard navigation
- Outline offset: 2px for visibility
- Icon color updates on focus

When navigating with Tab, focused items show:
- A visible outline
- Background and text colors matching the hover state
- Proper contrast for accessibility

The focus state is now visible and accessible for keyboard navigation.

---

_**User**_

Use this code as referense for@src/components/side-bar/index.tsx i need you improve accessibility of menu. I created example in simple html, use it:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LeadCMS.ai - Dashboard</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Skip to main content link for keyboard navigation -->
    <a href="#main-content" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

    <!-- Header -->
    <header role="banner">
        <div class="header">
            <a href="/" class="logo" aria-label="LeadCMS.ai home">
                <svg class="logo-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                    <!-- Logo SVG content -->
                </svg>
                <span>LeadCMS.ai</span>
            </a>
            
            <button 
                type="button" 
                class="toggle-btn" 
                aria-label="Toggle navigation menu"
                aria-expanded="true"
                aria-controls="main-navigation">
                <svg class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                    <!-- Toggle icon SVG -->
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Main Navigation -->
    <nav id="main-navigation" aria-label="Main navigation">
        <!-- MAIN Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-main">
            <h2 id="nav-main" class="nav-section-title">Main</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/dashboard" aria-current="page">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Dashboard icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Dashboard</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- CMS Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-cms">
            <h2 id="nav-cms" class="nav-section-title">CMS</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/content">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Content icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Content</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/media">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Media icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Media</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/links">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Links icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Links</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- CRM Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-crm">
            <h2 id="nav-crm" class="nav-section-title">CRM</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/contacts">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Contacts icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Contacts</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- MARKETING Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-marketing">
            <h2 id="nav-marketing" class="nav-section-title">Marketing</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/email-templates">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Email templates icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Email templates</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- OPERATIONS Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-operations">
            <h2 id="nav-operations" class="nav-section-title">Operations</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/tasks">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Tasks icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Tasks</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- GENERAL Section -->
        <section aria-labelledby="nav-general">
            <h2 id="nav-general" class="nav-section-title">General</h2>
            <ul role="list">
                <li>
                    <a href="/settings">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Settings icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Settings</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/users">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- Users icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>Users</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li>
                    <a href="/about">
                        <svg class="nav-icon" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
                            <!-- About icon -->
                        </svg>
                        <span>About</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </section>
    </nav>

    <!-- Main Content Area -->
    <main id="main-content" role="main">
        <!-- Your main content goes here -->
    </main>

</body>
</html>
