      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const SidebarLink = styled(ListItemButton, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =\u003e prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\u003c{ isCollapsed?: boolean }\u003e(({ theme, isCollapsed }) =\u003e &#96;\n  border-radius: ${theme.spacing(2)};\n  height: ${theme.spacing(9)};\n  margin-top: ${theme.spacing(1)};\n  margin-left: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"0\"};\n  margin-right: ${isCollapsed ? theme.spacing(1) : \"10px\"};\n  color: ${theme.palette.text.primary};\n  min-width: ${isCollapsed ? \"56px\" : \"auto\"};\n  justify-content: ${isCollapsed ? \"center\" : \"flex-start\"};\n  padding-left: ${isCollapsed ? \"0\" : theme.spacing(2)};\n  background-color: transparent;\n  transition: background-color 0.2s ease;\n\n  :hover {\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n  }\n\n  :focus,\n  :focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    outline-offset: 2px;\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.light};\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n  }\n\n  \u0026.Mui-selected {\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    font-weight: 600;\n\n    :hover {\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.dark};\n      color: ${theme.palette.primary.contrastText};\n    }\n\n    :focus,\n    :focus-visible {\n      outline: 2px solid ${theme.palette.primary.dark};\n      outline-offset: 2px;\n      background-color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    }\n  }\n&#96;);\n\nexport const SidebarLinkText = styled(ListItemText, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =\u003e prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const Sidebar = ({\n  menuItems = [],\n  onDrawerStateChange,\n  isLoading = false,\n}: SidebarProps) =\u003e {\n  const theme = useTheme();\n  const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down(\"md\"));\n  const { isOpen, isCollapsed, isMobileOpen, toggleCollapse, toggleMobile } = useSidebar();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  // Notify parent component when drawer state changes\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (onDrawerStateChange) {\n      onDrawerStateChange(isMobileOpen);\n    }\n  }, [isMobileOpen, onDrawerStateChange]);\n\n  const navigateToDashboard = useCallback(() =\u003e {\n    navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard));\n  }, [navigate]);\n\n  const effectiveOpen = isMobile ? isMobileOpen : isOpen;\n  const showCollapsed = !isMobile \u0026\u0026 isCollapsed;\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cSidebarStyled\n        variant={isMobile ? \"temporary\" : \"permanent\"}\n        open={effectiveOpen}\n        onClose={toggleMobile}\n        isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cSidebarTopContainer isMobile={isMobile} isOpen={effectiveOpen} isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\u003e\n          {\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "export const Sidebar = ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  menuItems = [],"

            "lineNumber": 37,

            "lineNumber": 39,

          },

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  const navigate = useNavigate();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  // Notify parent component when drawer state changes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    if (onDrawerStateChange) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      onDrawerStateChange(isMobileOpen);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  }, [isMobileOpen, onDrawerStateChange]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  const navigateToDashboard = useCallback(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    navigate(getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.dashboard));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  }, [navigate]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  const effectiveOpen = isMobile ? isMobileOpen : isOpen;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "  const showCollapsed = !isMobile \u0026\u0026 isCollapsed;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  return ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    \u003c\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      \u003cSidebarStyled"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        variant={isMobile ? \"temporary\" : \"permanent\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        open={effectiveOpen}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        onClose={toggleMobile}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        isCollapsed={showCollapsed}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        \u003cSidebarTopContainer isMobile={isMobile} isOpen={effectiveOpen} isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n\n        \u003cSidebarMenuScrollArea sx={{ pt: 4 }}\u003e\n          {isLoading ? (\n            \u003cdiv\n              style={{\n                display: \"flex\",\n                justifyContent: \"center\",\n                alignItems: \"center\",\n                height: \"100%\",\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003cCircularProgress /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          ) : (\n            \u003cnav\u003e\n            {menuItems.map((group) =\u003e (\n              \u003cList\n                key={group.header}\n                subheader={\n                  \u003cListSubheaderStyled isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\u003e\n                    {group.header}\n                  \u003c/ListSubheaderStyled\u003e\n                }\n                sx={{ mb: 2 }}\n              \u003e\n                {group.items.map((menuItem) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cTooltip\n                    key={menuItem.id}\n                    title={showCollapsed ? menuItem.label : \"\"}\n                    placement=\"right\"\n                  \u003e\n                    \u003cspan\u003e\n                      \u003cSidebarLink\n                        sx=\n                )\n            )\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const Sidebar = \n\n        \u003cSidebarTopContainer isMobile={isMobile} isOpen={effectiveOpen} isCollapsed={showCollapsed}\u003e\n          {!showCollapsed \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cdiv\n              className=\"sidebar-logo sidebar-link\"\n              style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", cursor: \"pointer\", flex: 1 }}\n              onClick={navigateToDashboard}\n              tabIndex={0}\n              role=\"button\"\n              aria-label=\"Go to dashboard\"\n            \u003e\n              \u003cLogoComponent /\u003e\n              \u003cTypography className=\"sidebar-app-name\"\u003eLeadCMS.ai\u003c/Typography\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          )}\n\n          {!isMobile \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cTooltip title={isCollapsed ? \"Expand sidebar\" : \"Collapse sidebar\"}\u003e\n              \u003cIconButton\n                onClick={toggleCollapse}\n                size=\"small\"\n                sx={{\n                  ml: showCollapsed ? 2 : 1,\n                  pr: showCollapsed ? 2 : 0,\n                }}\n              \u003e\n                {isCollapsed ? \u003cPanelLeftOpen /\u003e : \u003cPanelRightOpen /\u003e}\n              \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n            \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/SidebarTopContainer\u003e\n        \u003cSidebarMenuScrollArea sx={{ pt: 4 }}\u003e\n          {isLoading ? (\n            \u003cdiv\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { GhostLink } from \"components/ghost-link\";\nimport { ListItemIconStyled, SidebarLink, SidebarLinkText } from \"./index.styled\";\n\ntype SidebarLinkButtonProps = {\n  Icon?: React.ComponentType\u003cLucideProps\u003e;\n  title: string;\n  selected?: boolean;\n  to: string;\n};\n\nexport const SidebarLinkButton = ({ title, Icon, selected, to }: SidebarLinkButtonProps)\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { GhostLink } from \"components/ghost-link\";"

            "isSignature": true,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import List from \"@mui/material/List\";\nimport useMediaQuery from \"@mui/material/useMediaQuery\";\nimport {useTheme} from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\nimport Tooltip from \"@mui/material/Tooltip\";\nimport { useEffect, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport { PanelRightOpen, PanelLeftOpen } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport {\n  ListItemIconStyled,\n  ListSubheaderStyled,\n  SidebarLinkText,\n  SidebarLink,\n  SidebarStyled,\n  SidebarTopContainer,\n  SidebarMenuScrollArea,\n} from \"./index.styled\";\nimport { getCoreModuleRoute, CoreModule } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { useSidebar } from \"@providers/sidebar-provider\";\nimport { LogoComponent } from \"@components/app-header/index.styled\";\nimport Typography from \"@mui/material/Typography\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"react-router-dom\";\n\nimport { SidebarMenuSection } from \"@utils/build-menu-items\";\n\ninterface SidebarProps {\n  menuItems?: SidebarMenuSection[];\n  onDrawerStateChange?: (isOpen: boolean) =\u003e void;\n  isLoading?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport const Sidebar = ({\n  menuItems = [],\n  onDrawerStateChange,\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import List from \"@mui/material/List\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import useMediaQuery from \"@mui/material/useMediaQuery\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import {useTheme} from \"@mui/material/styles\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import CircularProgress from \"@mui/material/CircularProgress\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import Tooltip from \"@mui/material/Tooltip\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import { useEffect, useCallback } from \"react\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import { PanelRightOpen, PanelLeftOpen } from \"lucide-react\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import {"
          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const SidebarStyled = styled(Drawer, {\n  shouldForwardProp: (prop) =\u003e prop !== \"isCollapsed\",\n})\u003c{ isCollapsed?: boolean }\u003e(\n  ({ theme, isCollapsed }) =\u003e &#96;\n  width: ${isCollapsed ? \"65px\" : \"260px\"};\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  transition: width 0.3s ease;\n  .MuiDrawer-paper {\n    width: ${isCollapsed ? \"65px\" : \"260px\"};\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    height: 100vh;\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    border-right: 1px solid ${theme.palette.divider};\n    background-color: ${theme.palette.background.default};\n    position: fixed;\n    top: 0;\n    padding-bottom: 0;\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    overflow-x: hidden;\n  }\n&#96;\n);\n\nexport const MobileDrawerToggle = styled(IconButton)\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import ListItemButton from \"@mui/material/ListItemButton\";\nimport ListItemIcon from \"@mui/material/ListItemIcon\";\nimport ListItemText from \"@mui/material/ListItemText\";\nimport ListSubheader from \"@mui/material/ListSubheader\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport IconButton from \"@mui/material/IconButton\";\n\nexport const SidebarTopContainer = styled(\"div\")\u003c{\n  isMobile?: boolean;\n  isOpen?: boolean;\n  isCollapsed?: boolean;\n}\u003e(\n  ({ theme, isMobile, isOpen, isCollapsed }) =\u003e &#96;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  height: 64px;\n  min-height: 64px;\n  max-height: 64px;\n  padding-left: ${isCollapsed ? \"10px\" : \"16px\"};\n  padding-right: ${isCollapsed ? \"8px\" : \"16px\"};\n  width: 100%;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid ${\n    theme.palette.mode === \"dark\" ? theme.palette.secondary.light : theme.palette.divider\n  };\n  background: ${\n    theme.palette.mode === \"dark\" ? theme.palette.secondary.main : theme.palette.background.default\n  };\n  z-index: 1;\n  .sidebar-logo {\n    display: none;\n  }\n  .sidebar-app-name {\n    font-weight: bold;\n    font-size: 1.125rem;\n    color: ${theme.palette.primary.main};\n    margin-left: ${isMobile \u0026\u0026 isOpen ? \"40px\" : \"0\"};\n    transition: margin 0.2s;\n  }\n  @media (min-width: ${theme.breakpoints.values.md}px) {\n    .sidebar-logo {\n      display: block;\n      margin-right: 8px;\n    }\n    .sidebar-app-name {\n      margin-left: 0;\n    }\n  }\n  @media (max-width: ${theme.breakpoints.values.md - 1}px) {\n    .sidebar-logo {\n      display: none;\n    }\n  }\n&#96;\n);\n\nexport const SidebarMenuScrollArea = styled(\"div\")\n;",

      "score": 0.47075000405311584
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function buildMenuItems(\n  availableEntities: string[] | undefined,\n  selectedModule?: string\n): SidebarMenuSection[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set((availableEntities || []).map((e) =\u003e e.toLowerCase()));\n  const dash = getDashboardAvailability(availableEntities);\n\n  return MENU_CONFIG.map((section) =\u003e {\n    const filteredItems = section.items\n      .filter((item) =\u003e {\n        // For dashboard, also ensure there's at least one tile to show.\n        if (item.id === \"dashboard\") return dash.hasAny;\n        if (!item.entity) return true;\n        return entitySet.has(item.entity.toLowerCase());\n      })\n      .map((item) =\u003e ({\n        ...item,\n        onClick: (navigate: (to: string) =\u003e void) =\u003e navigate(item.route),\n        isSelected: selectedModule === item.id,\n      }));\n    if (filteredItems.length === 0) return null;\n    return { header: section.header, items: filteredItems };\n  }).filter((section): section is SidebarMenuSection =\u003e section !== null);\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "export function buildMenuItems("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  availableEntities: string[] | undefined,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  selectedModule?: string"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "): SidebarMenuSection[] {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const entitySet = new Set((availableEntities || []).map((e) =\u003e e.toLowerCase()));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const dash = getDashboardAvailability(availableEntities);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  return MENU_CONFIG.map((section) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    const filteredItems = section.items"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      .filter((item) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        // For dashboard, also ensure there's at least one tile to show."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        if (item.id === \"dashboard\") return dash.hasAny;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        if (!item.entity) return true;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        return entitySet.has(item.entity.toLowerCase());"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      .map((item) =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        ...item,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        onClick: (navigate: (to: string) =\u003e void) =\u003e navigate(item.route),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        isSelected: selectedModule === item.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      }));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    if (filteredItems.length === 0) return null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    return { header: section.header, items: filteredItems };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  }).filter((section): section is SidebarMenuSection =\u003e section !== null);"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 31
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 6
          }

        "contents": "export const MENU_CONFIG: SidebarMenuSection[] = [\n  {\n    header: \"MAIN\",\n    items: [\n      {\n        id: \"dashboard\",\n        label: \"Dashboard\",\n        icon:        label: \"Content\",\n        icon: \u003cFileText size={20} /\u003e,\n        entity: \"content\",\n        route: getCoreModuleRoute(CoreModule.content),\n      },\n      {\n        id:       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { getDashboardAvailability } from \"@features/dashboard/availability\";\n\nexport interface SidebarMenuSection {\n  header: string;\n  items: (MenuItem \u0026 { onClick: (navigate: (to: string) =\u003e void) =\u003e void; isSelected: boolean })[];\n}\n\nexport function buildMenuItems(\n  availableEntities: string[] | undefined,\n  selectedModule?: string\n): SidebarMenuSection[] {\n  \n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { getDashboardAvailability } from \"@features/dashboard/availability\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },

            "text": "export interface SidebarMenuSection {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  header: string;"
          },

            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 6,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import zod from \"zod\";\n\nconst FrontmatterSideMenu = zod.object({\n  name: zod.string(),\n  link: zod.string(),\n});\n\nconst FrontmatterValidationScheme = zod.object({\n  seoTitle: zod.string().optional(),\n  seoKeywords: zod.string().optional(),\n  seoDescription: zod.string().optional(),\n  avatar: zod.string().optional(),\n  sidemenu: FrontmatterSideMenu.array().optional(),\n  sourceHref: zod.string().url().optional(),\n});\n\nexport interface ValidateFrontmatterError {\n  errorMessage: string;\n  errorLine: number;\n}\n\ntype ErrorInfo = { _errors: string[] };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Basic JSX tag validation for MDX content\n */\nfunction validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\n  const lines = content.split(\"\\n\");\n  const tagStack: Array\u003c{ tag: string; line: number }\u003e = [];\n\n  // Regex to match JSX tags (both opening and closing)\n  const jsxTagRegex = /\u003c\\/?([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*(?:\\.[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)*)\\s*[^\u003e]*\u003e/g;\n  const selfClosingRegex = /\u003c[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*(?:\\.[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)*\\s*[^\u003e]*\\/\u003e/g;\n\n  for (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex \u003c lines.length; lineIndex++) {\n    const line = lines[lineIndex];\n    const lineNumber = lineIndex + 1;\n\n    // Skip code blocks and inline code\n    if (line.trim().startsWith(\"&#96;&#96;&#96;\") || line.includes(\"&#96;\")) {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    let match;\n    jsxTagRegex.lastIndex = 0; // Reset regex state\n\n    while ((match = jsxTagRegex.exec(line)) !== null) {\n      const fullTag = match[0];\n      const tagName = match[1];\n\n      // Skip self-closing tags\n      if (selfClosingRegex.test(fullTag)) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      // Skip HTML void elements\n      const voidElements = [\n        \"area\",\n        \"base\",\n        \"br\",\n        \"col\",\n        \"embed\",\n        \"hr\",\n        \"img\",\n        \"input\",\n        \"meta\",\n        \"param\",\n        \"source\",\n        \"track\",\n        \"wbr\",\n      ];\n      if (voidElements.includes(tagName.toLowerCase())) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      if (fullTag.startsWith(\"\u003c/\")) {\n        // Closing tag\n        if\n    }\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Validates MDX syntax using the official MDX compiler\n * This provides comprehensive validation including:\n * - Frontmatter block structure and YAML syntax\n * - JSX component syntax with proper nesting\n * - MDX-specific syntax and expressions\n * - Import/export statements\n * - JavaScript expressions in {expression} syntax\n */\nexport const validateMdxSyntax = async (content: string): Promise\u003cSyntaxValidationResult\u003e =\u003e {\n  if (!content.trim()) {\n    return { isValid: true };\n  }\n\n  // First, validate frontmatter structure and YAML syntax\n  const frontmatterResult = validateFrontmatter(content);\n  if (!frontmatterResult.isValid) {\n    return frontmatterResult;\n  }\n\n  // Then validate the MDX content using the official compiler\n  try {\n    await compile(content, {\n      development: true, // Better error messages in development\n      outputFormat: \"function-body\",\n      // Allow any JSX components without imports for validation\n      jsx: false,\n    });\n\n    return { isValid: true };\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\n    // Extract error information from the compile error\n    let message = \"MDX compilation failed\";\n    let line: number | undefined;\n    let column: number | undefined;\n\n    if (error \u0026\u0026 typeof error === \"object\" \u0026\u0026 \"message\" in error) {\n      const errorObj = error as { message?: string; line?: number; column?: number };\n      if (errorObj.message) {\n        message = errorObj.message;\n\n        // Try to extract line/column information from error message\n        const lineMatch = message.match(/:(\\d+):(\\d+)/);\n        if (lineMatch) {\n          line = parseInt(lineMatch[1], 10);\n          column = parseInt(lineMatch[2], 10);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Handle VFile errors (common in MDX compilation)\n      if (errorObj.line !== undefined) {\n        line = errorObj.line;\n      }\n      if (errorObj.column !== undefined) {\n        column = errorObj.column;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        message,\n        line,\n        column,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n      },\n    };\n  }\n};\n\n/**\n * Basic MDX syntax validation (fallback)\n * This is the current implementation that checks for:\n * - Unmatched JSX tags\n * - Invalid JSX syntax\n * - Frontmatter YAML syntax (if present)\n */",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": " * Validates MDX syntax using the official MDX compiler"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": " * This provides comprehensive validation including:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": " * - Frontmatter block structure and YAML syntax"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": " * - JSX component syntax with proper nesting"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": " * - MDX-specific syntax and expressions"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": " * - Import/export statements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": " * - JavaScript expressions in {expression} syntax"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "export const validateMdxSyntax = async (content: string): Promise\u003cSyntaxValidationResult\u003e =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "  if (!content.trim()) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "    return { isValid: true };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "  // First, validate frontmatter structure and YAML syntax"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "  const frontmatterResult = validateFrontmatter(content);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "  if (!frontmatterResult.isValid) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "    return frontmatterResult;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "  // Then validate the MDX content using the official compiler"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "    await compile(content, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "      development: true, // Better error messages in development"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "      outputFormat: \"function-body\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "      // Allow any JSX components without imports for validation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "      jsx: false,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    return { isValid: true };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "  } catch (error: unknown) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    // Extract error information from the compile error"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    let message = \"MDX compilation failed\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "    let line: number | undefined;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "    let column: number | undefined;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    if (error \u0026\u0026 typeof error === \"object\" \u0026\u0026 \"message\" in error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "      const errorObj = error as { message?: string; line?: number; column?: number };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "      if (errorObj.message) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "        message = errorObj.message;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "        // Try to extract line/column information from error message"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "        const lineMatch = message.match(/:(\\d+):(\\d+)/);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "        if (lineMatch) {"

            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "          line = parseInt(lineMatch[1], 10);"

            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "          column = parseInt(lineMatch[2], 10);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "      // Handle VFile errors (common in MDX compilation)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "      if (errorObj.line !== undefined) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "        line = errorObj.line;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "      if (errorObj.column !== undefined) {"

            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "    }"

            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "    return {"
          },
          {

            "text": "      isValid: false,"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "      },"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "};"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248

          {
            "lineNumber": 249,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { rootRoute } from \"lib/router\";\nimport { BreadcrumbLink } from \"types\";\n\nexport const dataListBreadcrumbLinks: BreadcrumbLink[] = [\n  { linkText: \"Dashboard\", toRoute: rootRoute },\n];\n\nexport const countryListStorageKey = \"countryList\";",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import { rootRoute } from \"lib/router\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { BreadcrumbLink } from \"types\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },

            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "export const dataListBreadcrumbLinks: BreadcrumbLink[] = ["
          },

            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  { linkText: \"Dashboard\", toRoute: rootRoute },"
          },

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "export const countryListStorageKey = \"countryList\";"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const generateSitePreviewUrl = (\n  template: string,\n  params: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e,\n  defaultLanguage?: string\n): string =\u003e {\n  let url = template;\n\n  // Create enhanced params with calculated fields\n  const enhancedParams = { ...params };\n\n  // Calculate lang+slug parameter\n  if (params.language \u0026\u0026 params.slug) {\n    const lang = calculateLangPrefix(String(params.language), defaultLanguage);\n    enhancedParams[\"lang+slug\"] = &#96;${lang}${params.slug}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  Object.keys(enhancedParams).forEach((key) =\u003e {\n    // Escape special regex characters in the key\n    const escapedKey = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$\u0026\");\n    url = url.replace(\n      new RegExp(&#96;\\\\{${escapedKey}\\\\}&#96;, \"g\"),\n      enhancedParams[key] !== undefined ? String(enhancedParams[key]) : \"\"\n    );\n  });\n  return url;\n};\n\nexport const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string)\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 22,

          },

            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";\n  const path = window.location.pathname;\n  const moduleRaw = path.split(\"/\")[1] || \"\";\n  return moduleRaw\n    .split(\"-\")\n    .filter(Boolean)\n    .map(word =\u003e word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())\n    .join(\" \");\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "export function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "  const path = window.location.pathname;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "  const moduleRaw = path.split(\"/\")[1] || \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "  return moduleRaw"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    .split(\"-\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    .filter(Boolean)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    .map(word =\u003e word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase())"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    .join(\" \");"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "}"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format\n * Returns Promise\u003cSyntaxValidationResult\u003e for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others\n */\nexport const validateContentSyntax = (\n  content: string,\n  format: string\n): SyntaxValidationResult | Promise\u003cSyntaxValidationResult\u003e =\u003e {\n  const upperFormat = format.toUpperCase();\n\n  switch (upperFormat) {\n    case \"JSON\":\n      return validateJsonSyntax(content);\n    case \"YAML\":\n    case \"YML\":\n      return validateYamlSyntax(content);\n    case \"MDX\":\n    case \"MD\":\n    case \"MARKDOWN\":\n      return validateMdxSyntax(content); // This is now async\n    case \"HTML\":\n      // For HTML, we can use basic JSX validation\n      return validateJsxTags(content);\n    default:\n      // For plain text or unknown formats, always valid\n      return { isValid: true };\n  }\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": " * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format"

          },

            "text": "export const validateContentSyntax = ("

          },

            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "  switch (upperFormat) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "    case \"JSON\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "      return validateJsonSyntax(content);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    case \"YAML\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "    case \"YML\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "      return validateYamlSyntax(content);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "    case \"MDX\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "    case \"MD\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "    case \"MARKDOWN\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "      return validateMdxSyntax(content); // This is now async"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "    case \"HTML\":"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "      // For HTML, we can use basic JSX validation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "      return validateJsxTags(content);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "    default:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "      // For plain text or unknown formats, always valid"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "      return { isValid: true };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "};"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 434

            "column": 1,
            "line": 405

      "score": 0.07942649722099304
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\nfor (let lineIndex = 0; lineIndex \u003c lines.length; lineIndex++) {\nwhile ((match = jsxTagRegex.exec(line)) !== null) {\n\n\n      if (fullTag.startsWith(\"\u003c/\")) {\n        // Closing tag\n        if (tagStack.length === 0) {\n          return {\n            isValid: false,\n            error: {\n              message: &#96;Unexpected closing tag '\u003c/${tagName}\u003e' - no matching opening tag found&#96;,\n              line: lineNumber,\n              type: \"mdx\",\n            },\n          };\n        }\n\n        const lastOpenTag = tagStack[tagStack.length - 1];\n        if (lastOpenTag.tag !== tagName) {\n          return {\n            isValid: false,\n            error: {\n              message: &#96;Mismatched tag: expected \u003c/${lastOpenTag.tag}\u003e but got \u003c/${tagName}\u003e&#96;,\n              line: lineNumber,\n              type: \"mdx\",\n            },\n          };\n        }\n\n        tagStack.pop();\n      } else {\n        // Opening tag\n        tagStack.push({ tag: tagName, line: lineNumber });\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check for unclosed tags\n  if (tagStack.length \u003e 0) {\n    const unclosedTag = tagStack[tagStack.length - 1];\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        message: &#96;Unclosed tag '\u003c${unclosedTag.tag}\u003e' opened at line ${unclosedTag.line}&#96;,\n        line: unclosedTag.line,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  return { isValid: true };\n}\n\n/**\n * Main validation function that determines the appropriate validator based on format\n * Returns Promise\u003cSyntaxValidationResult\u003e for MDX (async) and SyntaxValidationResult for others\n */",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Determines the status of content based on its publishedAt date\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Content status information including status, color, and tooltip\n */\nexport const getContentStatus = (publishedAt: string | null): ContentStatusInfo =\u003e {\n  if (!publishedAt) {\n    return {\n      status: \"Draft\",\n      color: \"warning\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);\n  const now = new Date();\n\n  if (publishedDate \u003e now) {\n    return {\n      status: \"Planned\",\n      color: \"info\",\n      tooltip: &#96;Scheduled for ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,\n    };\n  }\n\n  return {\n    status: \"Published\",\n    color: \"success\",\n    tooltip: &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,\n  };\n};\n\n/**\n * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Formatted tooltip string or empty string\n */",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": " * Determines the status of content based on its publishedAt date"

            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "export const getContentStatus = (publishedAt: string | null): ContentStatusInfo =\u003e {"

          },

            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      status: \"Draft\","
          },

            "lineNumber": 22,

          },

            "lineNumber": 23,

          },

            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25

            "text": "  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  if (publishedDate \u003e now) {"

            "lineNumber": 31,

          },

            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      color: \"info\","
          },

            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      tooltip: &#96;Scheduled for ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  return {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    status: \"Published\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    color: \"success\","
          },

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    tooltip: &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;,"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Basic MDX syntax validation (fallback)\n * This is the current implementation that checks for:\n * - Unmatched JSX tags\n * - Invalid JSX syntax\n * - Frontmatter YAML syntax (if present)\n */\nexport const validateMdxSyntaxBasic = (content: string): SyntaxValidationResult =\u003e {\n  if (!content.trim()) {\n    return { isValid: true };\n  }\n\n  // First, check frontmatter if it exists\n  const frontmatterMatch = content.match(/^---\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n---\\s*\\n/s);\n  if (frontmatterMatch) {\n    const frontmatterContent = frontmatterMatch[1];\n    const yamlResult = validateYamlSyntax(frontmatterContent);\n    if (!yamlResult.isValid) {\n      const yamlError = yamlResult.error;\n      if (!yamlError) return { isValid: true }; // This shouldn't happen but satisfies TypeScript\n\n      return {\n        isValid: false,\n        error: {\n          ...yamlError,\n          message: &#96;Frontmatter error: ${yamlError.message}&#96;,\n          type: \"mdx\",\n          // Adjust line numbers to account for frontmatter position\n          line: yamlError.line ? yamlError.line + 1 : undefined,\n        },\n      };\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Remove frontmatter for JSX validation\n  const contentWithoutFrontmatter = content.replace(/^---\\s*\\n(.*?)\\n---\\s*\\n/s, \"\");\n\n  // Basic JSX tag matching validation\n  const result = validateJsxTags(contentWithoutFrontmatter);\n  if (!result.isValid) {\n    // Adjust line numbers if frontmatter was present\n    const frontmatterLines = frontmatterMatch ? frontmatterMatch[0].split(\"\\n\").length - 1 : 0;\n    const resultError = result.error;\n    if (!resultError) return { isValid: true }; // This shouldn't happen but satisfies TypeScript\n\n    return {\n      isValid: false,\n      error: {\n        ...resultError,\n        type: \"mdx\",\n        line: resultError.line ? resultError.line + frontmatterLines : undefined,\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  return { isValid: true };\n};\n\n/**\n * Basic JSX tag validation for MDX content\n */\nfunction validateJsxTags(content: string): SyntaxValidationResult {\n  const lines = content.split(\"\\n\");\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const openSitePreview = (\n  params: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e,\n  template: string,\n  defaultLanguage?: string\n): boolean =\u003e {\n  // Generate the preview URL (this will calculate lang+slug and other enhanced params)\n  const previewUrl = generateSitePreviewUrl(template, params, defaultLanguage);\n\n  // Check if there are still unresolved placeholders after URL generation\n  const unresolvedPlaceholders = previewUrl.match(/{(.*?)}/g) || [];\n\n  if (unresolvedPlaceholders.length \u003e 0) {\n    const missingKeys = unresolvedPlaceholders.map((k) =\u003e k.replace(/[{}]/g, \"\"));\n    console.debug(\"[PreviewHelper] Missing required params for site preview:\", missingKeys, {\n      params,\n      template,\n      previewUrl,\n    });\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  console.log(\"[PreviewHelper] Opening site preview:\", previewUrl);\n\n  // Open in new tab\n  window.open(previewUrl, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n  return true;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

      "codeBlock": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const typeMapping: Record\u003cstring, string\u003e = {\n  string: \"input\",\n  integer: \"input\",\n  boolean: \"checkbox\",\n  enum: \"select\",\n  array: \"input\",\n};\n\nexport const getImportFields = (importModel: any) =\u003e {\n  const importContactFields = Object.keys(importModel)\n    .map((key) =\u003e {\n      const property = importModel[key];\n\n      if (!property.type) {\n        return; // skip the field if property.type is undefined\n      }\n\n      const importType = typeMapping[property.type] ? typeMapping[property.type] : \"input\";\n      let example = property.example ? property.example : \"string\";\n\n      if (example instanceof Array || example instanceof Object) {\n        example = JSON.stringify(example);\n      }\n\n      const alternatives = getAlternatives(key, property.title);\n      const title = property.title ? property.title : key;\n      const validations = buildValidations(key, property);\n\n      return {\n        key,\n        label: title,\n        alternateMatches: alternatives,\n        fieldType: {\n          type: importType,\n        },\n        example: example,\n        validations: validations,\n      };\n    })\n    .filter(Boolean);\n\n  return importContactFields;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\n * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status\n * @param publishedAt The published at date string or null\n * @returns Formatted tooltip string or empty string\n */\nexport const getContentStatusTooltip = (publishedAt: string | null): string =\u003e {\n  if (!publishedAt) {\n    return \"\";\n  }\n\n  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);\n  const now = new Date();\n\n  if (publishedDate \u003e now) {\n    return &#96;Scheduled for ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  return &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "/**"
          },

            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": " * Get a formatted tooltip title for the content status"

            "lineNumber": 47,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "export const getContentStatusTooltip = (publishedAt: string | null): string =\u003e {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  if (!publishedAt) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "  const publishedDate = new Date(publishedAt);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  const now = new Date();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  if (publishedDate \u003e now) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  return &#96;Published on ${publishedDate.toLocaleDateString()}&#96;;"
          },

            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "};"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string): string =\u003e {\n  if (!contentLanguage || !defaultLanguage || contentLanguage === defaultLanguage) {\n    return \"\";\n  }\n  return &#96;${contentLanguage}/&#96;;\n};\n\nexport const openSitePreview = (\n  params: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e,\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "export const calculateLangPrefix = (contentLanguage: string, defaultLanguage?: string): string =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  if (!contentLanguage || !defaultLanguage || contentLanguage === defaultLanguage) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  return &#96;${contentLanguage}/&#96;;"
          },

            "text": "};"

          },

            "lineNumber": 36,

          },

            "text": ";"

        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export async function execSubmitWithToast\u003cT\u003e(\n  values: T,\n  helpers: FormikHelpers\u003cT\u003e,\n  submitFunc: (values: T, helpers: FormikHelpers\u003cT\u003e) =\u003e Promise\u003cvoid\u003e,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =\u003e void,\n  entityName: string,\n  options?: {\n    fieldMapping?: Record\u003cstring, string\u003e;\n    customValidationErrorMessage?: string;\n  }\n): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n {\n    pending: &#96;Saving ${nameWithMinFirstLetter}...&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${nameWithCapFirstLetter} saved successfully&#96;,\n    error: (error: unknown) =\u003e {\n      // Cast error to the expected structure for type safety\n      const httpError = error as ErrorResponse;\n\n      // Try to handle validation errors first using the generic error handler\n      const handleValidationErrors = async () =\u003e {\n        try {\n          await handleFormError(error, {\n            formik: helpers,\n            notificationsService,\n            fieldMapping: options?.fieldMapping || {},\n            customErrorMessage: options?.customValidationErrorMessage,\n            showGenericError: false, // We'll handle generic errors below\n          });\n          return true; // Validation errors were handled\n        } catch {\n          return false; // Not validation errors or couldn't handle them\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Check if this is a validation error that we can handle\n      if (httpError?.status === 422 || httpError?.status === 400) {\n        handleValidationErrors();\n        // Still show the error modal for details\n      }\n\n      // Prepare error details for the modal and toast\n      const errMessage = &#96;Unable to save ${entityName}. An error occurred.&#96;;\n      const errDetails: string[] = [];\n\n      if (httpError?.data?.error?.title) {\n        errDetails.push(httpError.data.error.title);\n      }\n      if (httpError?.data?.message) {\n        errDetails.push(httpError.data.message);\n      }\n      if (httpError?.data?.error?.errors) {\n        errDetails.push(...networkErrorToStringArray(httpError.data.error.errors));\n      }\n\n      return {\n        title: errMessage,\n        onClick:\n          errDetails.length \u003e 0\n            ? () =\u003e {\n                showErrorModalFunc(errDetails);\n              }\n            : undefined,\n      };\n    },\n  });\n}",

        "contents": "import { FormikHelpers } from \"formik\";\nimport { NotificationsService } from \"@hooks\";\nimport { networkErrorToStringArray } from \"./general-helper\";\nimport { handleFormError, ErrorResponse } from \"./error-handler\";\n\nexport async function execSubmitWithToast\u003cT\u003e(\n  values: T,\n  helpers: FormikHelpers\u003cT\u003e,\n  submitFunc: (values: T, helpers: FormikHelpers\u003cT\u003e) =\u003e Promise\u003cvoid\u003e,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =\u003e void,\n  entityName: string,\n  options?: {\n    fieldMapping?: Record\u003cstring, string\u003e;\n    customValidationErrorMessage?: string;\n  }\n): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n  const nameWithCapFirstLetter =\n    entityName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + entityName.slice(1).toLowerCase();\n  const nameWithMinFirstLetter = entityName.toLowerCase();\n\n  notificationsService.promise(submitFunc(values, helpers), {\n    pending: &#96;Saving ${nameWithMinFirstLetter}...&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${nameWithCapFirstLetter} saved successfully&#96;,\n\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const execDeleteWithToast = async (\n  deleteFunc: () =\u003e Promise\u003cvoid\u003e,\n  notificationsService: NotificationsService,\n  entity: string,\n  showErrorModalFunc: (value: string[]) =\u003e void\n) =\u003e {\n  const entityNameWithCapFirstLetter =\n    entity.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + entity.slice(1).toLowerCase();\n  notificationsService.promise(deleteFunc(), {\n    pending: &#96;Deleting ${entity}&#96;,\n    success: &#96;${entityNameWithCapFirstLetter} deleted successfully&#96;,\n    error: (error) =\u003e {\n      const errMessage = &#96;Unable to delete ${entity}. An error occurred.&#96;;\n      const errDetails: string[] = [];\n      if (error.data?.error?.title) {\n        errDetails.push(error.data.error.title);\n      }\n      if (error.data?.message) {\n        errDetails.push(error.data.message);\n      }\n      if (error.data?.error?.errors) {\n        errDetails.push(...networkErrorToStringArray(error.data.error.errors));\n      }\n      return {\n        title: errMessage,\n        onClick: errDetails.length \u003e 0 ? () =\u003e showErrorModalFunc(errDetails) : undefined,\n      };\n    },\n  });\n};\n\nexport function getModuleNameFromUrl(): string {\n  if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"\";\n}",

        "contents": "export const getFormattedDateTime = (dateToConvert: string) =\u003e {\n  const date = new Date(dateToConvert);\n  const formattedDate = date.toLocaleDateString(undefined, {\n    year: \"numeric\",\n    month: \"2-digit\",\n    day: \"2-digit\",\n  });\n  const formattedTime = date.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, {\n    hour: \"numeric\",\n    minute: \"numeric\",\n    second: \"numeric\",\n    hour12: true,\n  });\n  const formattedDateTime = &#96;${formattedDate}  ${formattedTime}&#96;;\n  return formattedDateTime;\n};\n\nexport const getFormattedDateOnly = (dateToConvert: string) =\u003e\n;",

_**Agent (default)**_


## Accessibility improvements

### 1. **Semantic HTML structure**
- Added `<nav>` with `id="main-navigation"` and `aria-label="Main navigation"`
- Wrapped menu groups in `<section>` elements with `aria-labelledby`
- Added `<h2>` headings for section headers with unique IDs
- Used `<li>` with `role="none"` for list items (wrapped in Tooltip)

### 2. **ARIA attributes**
- Logo link: `aria-label="LeadCMS.ai home"`
- Toggle button: `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls="main-navigation"`, `aria-label`
- Section headers: unique IDs (`nav-main`, `nav-cms`, etc.) with `aria-labelledby`
- Menu items: `aria-current="page"` for the current page
- Icons: `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"` for decorative icons
- Lists: `role="list"` for proper list semantics

### 3. **Navigation improvements**
- Converted logo from `<div>` with onClick to `<GhostLink>` (proper anchor)
- Converted menu items from onClick handlers to `<GhostLink>` components
- Proper Link components enable right-click "Open in new tab" and better keyboard navigation

### 4. **Icon accessibility**
- Icons are cloned with `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`
- Screen readers skip decorative icons and focus on text labels

### 5. **Keyboard navigation**
- Focus states already implemented
- Proper Link components work with keyboard navigation
- ARIA attributes help screen readers understand structure

The sidebar is now more accessible and follows WCAG guidelines. Screen readers can navigate the structure, and keyboard users can interact with all elements.

---

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import Box from \"@mui/material/Box\";\nimport { styled } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport { PropsWithChildren } from \"react\";\nimport \"react-toastify/dist/ReactToastify.css\";\n\nexport const AppLayoutContainerStyled = styled(Box)&#96;\n  display: grid;\n  height: 100vh;\n  grid-template-columns: ${({ theme }) =\u003e theme.spacing(64)} 1fr;\n  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;\n  grid-template-areas:\n    \"header header\"\n    \"sidebar main\";\n&#96;;\n\nexport const AppLayoutContainer = ({ children }: PropsWithChildren) =\u003e\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ModuleWrapper = ({\n  leftContainerChildren,\n  extraActionsContainerChildren,\n  addButtonContainerChildren,\n  actionButtons,\n  isForm = false,\n  fullWidth: propFullWidth,\n  children,\n}: ModuleWrapperProps) =\u003e {\n  const { isBusy } = useModuleWrapperContext();\n  const { fullWidth: contextFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Use prop fullWidth if provided, otherwise use context fullWidth\n  const fullWidth = propFullWidth ?? contextFullWidth;\n\n  const rightActions = [\n    ...flattenChildren(extraActionsContainerChildren),\n    addButtonContainerChildren,\n  ].filter(React.isValidElement);\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleContainer fullWidth={fullWidth}\u003e\n      {(leftContainerChildren || extraActionsContainerChildren || addButtonContainerChildren) \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cActionsContainer\u003e\n          {leftContainerChildren \u0026\u0026 \u003cLeftContainer\u003e{leftContainerChildren}\u003c/LeftContainer\u003e}\n          {(extraActionsContainerChildren || addButtonContainerChildren) \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cRightContainer\u003e\n              \u003cResponsiveActions actions={rightActions} gap={3} /\u003e\n            \u003c/RightContainer\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/ActionsContainer\u003e\n      )}\n      \u003cModuleContentContainer\u003e\n        \u003cScrollContainer id=\"scrollTarget\"\u003e\n          {isForm ? \u003cFormContainer\u003e{children}\u003c/FormContainer\u003e : children}\n        \u003c/ScrollContainer\u003e\n        {actionButtons \u0026\u0026 \u003cFixedActionBar\u003e{actionButtons}\u003c/FixedActionBar\u003e}\n        {isBusy \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003c\u003e\n            \u003cLoadingIndicatorContainer /\u003e\n            \u003cCenteredCircularProgress size={40} thickness={4} /\u003e\n          \u003c/\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/ModuleContentContainer\u003e\n    \u003c/ModuleContainer\u003e\n  );\n};\n\nfunction flattenChildren(children: React.ReactNode): React.ReactElement[] {\n  const result: React.ReactElement[] = [];\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ModuleLoader = () =\u003e {\n  const { moduleName } = useParams\u003cModuleRouteParams\u003e();\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n      \u003cErrorBoundary FallbackComponent={ErrorBoundaryFallbackPage} resetKeys={[moduleName]}\u003e\n        \u003cSuspense fallback=\"Loading...\"\u003e\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.content \u0026\u0026 \u003cContentModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.contacts \u0026\u0026 \u003cContactsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.unsubscribes \u0026\u0026 \u003cUnsubscribesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.links \u0026\u0026 \u003cLinksModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.comments \u0026\u0026 \u003cCommentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.accounts \u0026\u0026 \u003cAccountsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.orders \u0026\u0026 \u003cOrdersModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.domains \u0026\u0026 \u003cDomainsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.segments \u0026\u0026 \u003cSegmentsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.users \u0026\u0026 \u003cUserModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.about \u0026\u0026 \u003cAboutModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.emailTemplates \u0026\u0026 \u003cEmailTemplatesModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.activityLogs \u0026\u0026 \u003cActivityLogModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.dashboard \u0026\u0026 \u003cDashboardModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.media \u0026\u0026 \u003cMediaModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.settings \u0026\u0026 \u003cSettingsModule /\u003e}\n          {moduleName === CoreModule.tasks \u0026\u0026 \u003cTasksModule /\u003e}\n          {!moduleName \u0026\u0026 \u003cNavigate to={defaultModuleRoute} replace /\u003e}\n        \u003c/Suspense\u003e\n      \u003c/ErrorBoundary\u003e\n    \u003c/ModuleWrapperProvider\u003e\n  );\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { AppHeader } from \"@components/app-header\";\nimport { Sidebar } from \"@components/side-bar\";\nimport { AppLayoutWrapper, MainColumn, MainContent } from \"./index.styled\";\nimport useMediaQuery from \"@mui/material/useMediaQuery\";\nimport { useTheme } from \"@mui/material/styles\";\nimport { buildMenuItems } from \"../../utils/build-menu-items\";\nimport { useParams } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { SidebarProvider } from \"@providers/sidebar-provider\";\nimport { useConfig } from \"@providers/config-provider\";\nimport { ModuleRouteParams } from \"@lib/router\";\n\ninterface AppLayoutProps {\n  children: ReactNode;\n  className?: string;\n  breadcrumbs?: { linkText: string; toRoute: string }[];\n  currentBreadcrumb?: string;\n  fullWidth?: boolean;\n}\n\n\n\nexport const AppLayout = ({\n  children,\n  className = \"\",\n  breadcrumbs = []\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import ReactDOM from \"react-dom/client\";\nimport { App } from \"./app\";\nimport { SidebarProvider } from \"@providers/sidebar-provider\";\n\nconst rootNode = document.getElementById(\"root\");\nif (rootNode) {\n  ReactDOM.createRoot(rootNode).render(\n    \u003cSidebarProvider\u003e\n      \u003cApp /\u003e\n    \u003c/SidebarProvider\u003e\n  );\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const AppLayoutContainer = ({ children }: PropsWithChildren) =\u003e {\n  return \u003cAppLayoutContainerStyled\u003e{children}\u003c/AppLayoutContainerStyled\u003e;\n};\n\n// Changing this from Box to div to avoid duplicate main element\nexport const MainContentContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentList = \nconst extraActions = [\n\n    /\u003e,\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapper\n      breadcrumbs={[]}\n      currentBreadcrumb={\"Content\"}\n      leftContainerChildren={searchBar}\n      extraActionsContainerChildren={extraActions}\n      addButtonContainerChildren={\n        \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", gap: 1 }}\u003e\n          \u003cButton\n            variant=\"contained\"\n            to={\n              selectedContentType\n                ? &#96;/content/new?contentType=${selectedContentType}&#96;\n                : \"/content/new\"\n            }\n            component={GhostLink}\n            startIcon={\u003cPlus size={18} /\u003e}\n          \u003e\n            Add Content\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n          {config?.capabilities?.includes(\"AIAssistance\") \u0026\u0026 (\n            \u003cButton\n              variant=\"outlined\"\n              onClick={handleAIDraftClick}\n              startIcon={\u003cSparkles size={18} /\u003e}\n            \u003e\n              Create with AI\n            \u003c/Button\u003e\n          )}\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      }\n    \u003e\n      \u003cCustomFilterBar\n        columns={contentFilterColumns}\n        whereFilters={whereFilters}\n        addFilter={addFilter}\n        removeFilter={removeFilter}\n        filterPanelOpen={filterPanelOpen}\n        setFilterPanelOpen={setFilterPanelOpen}\n        clearAllFilters={clearAllFilters}\n      /\u003e\n\n      {/* Content Type Filter */}\n      \u003cBox sx={{ mb: 3 }}\u003e\n        \u003cContentTypeFilter\n          selectedContentType={selectedContentType}\n          onContentTypeChange={handleContentTypeChange}\n          statistics={statistics}\n        /\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003cNoRecordsDisplay\n        visible={!isLoading \u0026\u0026 contentItemsCount === 0}\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const App = \n\n\n  function useBreadcrumbs(\n    pathname: string,\n    propsBreadcrumbs?: Breadcrumb[],\n    propsCurrentBreadcrumb?: string\n  ) {\n    if (propsBreadcrumbs \u0026\u0026 propsBreadcrumbs.length \u003e 0) {\n      return { breadcrumbs: propsBreadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb: propsCurrentBreadcrumb || \"\" };\n    }\n    const paths = pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);\n    const firstPath = paths[0];\n    const breadcrumbs: Breadcrumb[] = [];\n    let currentBreadcrumb = \"\";\n    if (firstPath \u0026\u0026 menuCategories[firstPath]) {\n      breadcrumbs.push({\n        linkText: menuCategories[firstPath].category,\n        toRoute: &#96;/${firstPath}&#96;,\n        isCategory: true,\n      });\n      currentBreadcrumb = menuCategories[firstPath].name;\n    }\n    return { breadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb };\n  }\n\n  function AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n    const location = useLocation();\n    const { fullWidth } = useLayout();\n    let propsBreadcrumbs, propsCurrentBreadcrumb;\n    if (children \u0026\u0026 typeof children === \"object\" \u0026\u0026 \"props\" in children \u0026\u0026 children.props) {\n      propsBreadcrumbs = children.props.breadcrumbs;\n      propsCurrentBreadcrumb = children.props.currentBreadcrumb;\n    }\n    const { breadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb } = useBreadcrumbs(\n      location.pathname,\n      propsBreadcrumbs,\n      propsCurrentBreadcrumb\n    );\n    return (\n      \u003cAppLayout\n        breadcrumbs={breadcrumbs}\n        currentBreadcrumb={currentBreadcrumb}\n        fullWidth={fullWidth}\n      \u003e\n        {children}\n      \u003c/AppLayout\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cLocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}\u003e\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "export const App = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  function useBreadcrumbs("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    pathname: string,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    propsBreadcrumbs?: Breadcrumb[],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    propsCurrentBreadcrumb?: string"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    if (propsBreadcrumbs \u0026\u0026 propsBreadcrumbs.length \u003e 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      return { breadcrumbs: propsBreadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb: propsCurrentBreadcrumb || \"\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    const paths = pathname.split(\"/\").filter(Boolean);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    const firstPath = paths[0];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    const breadcrumbs: Breadcrumb[] = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    let currentBreadcrumb = \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    if (firstPath \u0026\u0026 menuCategories[firstPath]) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      breadcrumbs.push({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "        linkText: menuCategories[firstPath].category,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        toRoute: &#96;/${firstPath}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "        isCategory: true,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      currentBreadcrumb = menuCategories[firstPath].name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    return { breadcrumbs, currentBreadcrumb };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  function AppLayoutWithAutoBreadcrumbs({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    const location = useLocation();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    const { fullWidth } = useLayout();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    let propsBreadcrumbs, propsCurrentBreadcrumb;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    if (children \u0026\u0026 typeof children === \"object\" \u0026\u0026 \"props\" in children \u0026\u0026 children.props) {"

          },
          {

            "text": "      propsCurrentBreadcrumb = children.props.currentBreadcrumb;"

            "lineNumber": 79,

            "lineNumber": 80,

            "lineNumber": 87,

            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "        {children}"

            "lineNumber": 92,

            "lineNumber": 93,

            "lineNumber": 94,

            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  return ("

            "text": "    \u003cLocalizationProvider dateAdapter={AdapterDayjs}\u003e"

            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": ";"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentList = \n\n\n      \u003cContentListContainer\u003e\n        {isLoading \u0026\u0026 contentItems.length === 0 ? (\n          \u003cBox display=\"flex\" justifyContent=\"center\" alignItems=\"center\" minHeight={300}\u003e\n            \u003cCircularProgress /\u003e\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        ) : (\n          \u003c\u003e\n            \u003cInfiniteScroll\n              dataLength={contentItems.length}\n              next={fetchData}\n              hasMore={contentItemsCount !== contentItems.length}\n              loader={contentItems.length \u003c contentItemsCount ? \u003ch4\u003eLoading...\u003c/h4\u003e : null}\n              hasChildren={true}\n              scrollableTarget=\"scrollTarget\"\n              style={{ overflow: \"unset\" }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003cGrid container spacing={4} id=\"scrollTarget\" ref={scrollTargetRef}\u003e\n                {contentItems.map((item) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cGrid\n                    size={{ xs: 12, sm: 6, md: 4, lg: 2.4 }}\n                    key={&#96;content-${item.id}&#96;}\n                    sx={{ mb: 3, minWidth: 290, maxWidth: 330 }}\n                  \u003e\n                    \u003cItemCard\n                      item={item}\n                      onDelete={handleDeleteClick}\n                      onTranslate={handleTranslate}\n                      hasSitePreview={hasSitePreview}\n                      previewUrlTemplate={configSettings?.PreviewUrlTemplate}\n                      defaultLanguage={defaultLanguage}\n                      hasMultipleLanguages={(config?.languages?.length || 0) \u003e 1}\n                      key={&#96;content-card-${item.id}&#96;}\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/Grid\u003e\n                ))}\n              \u003c/Grid\u003e\n            \u003c/InfiniteScroll\u003e\n          \u003c/\u003e\n        )}\n        {/* Delete dialog */}\n        \u003cDialog open={isDeleteDialogOpen} onClose={handleDeleteCancel}\u003e\n          \u003cDialogTitle\u003eDelete Content\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentEditContainer = styled(\"div\")&#96;\n  flex-grow: 1;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  max-width: 100%;\n  min-height: calc(100vh - 144px); /* Ensure proper loading positioning */\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: stretch;\n  justify-content: stretch;\n  padding: 0;\n&#96;;\n\nexport const ContentDeleteContainer = styled(\"div\")\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentEdit = \n\n                              \u003cMDXEditorNew\n                                key={mdxEditorKey}\n                                onChange={async (value) =\u003e {\n                                  contentFormOps.setWasModified(true);\n                                  await contentFormOps.formik.setFieldValue(\"body\", value || \"\");\n                                }}\n                                onContentChangeStatus={(hasChanged) =\u003e {\n                                  contentFormOps.setHasContentChanged(hasChanged);\n                                }}\n                                value={contentFormOps.formik.values.body}\n                                isReadOnly={props.readonly}\n                                contentDetails={contentFormOps.formik.values}\n                                livePreview={\n                                  contentFormOps.useLivePreview \u0026\u0026 canShowLivePreviewPane\n                                }\n                                livePreviewTemplate={getPreviewTemplate()}\n                                isMetadataCollapsed={isMetadataCollapsed}\n                                preloadedMdxComponents={contentDataOps.preloadedMdxComponents}\n                                originalContentForDiff={contentFormOps.originalContent}\n                                contentFormat={resolvedFormat as ContentFormat}\n                              /\u003e\n                              {/* Show validation bubble when preview pane is not visible */}\n                              {(!canShowLivePreviewPane ||\n                                !contentFormOps.useLivePreview ||\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { Route, Routes } from \"react-router-dom\";\nimport { ContentEdit } from \"./content-edit\";\n\nexport const ContentModule = () =\u003e {\n  return (\n    \u003cRoutes\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/\"} element={\u003cContentList /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/new\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/ai-draft\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/duplicate\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage/:type\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:sourceId/translate/:targetLanguage\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n      \u003cRoute path={\"/:id/edit\"} element={\u003cContentEdit /\u003e} /\u003e\n    \u003c/Routes\u003e\n  );\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
