      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentEdit = \n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cform onSubmit={handleFormSubmit}\u003e\n      \u003cModuleWrapper\n        breadcrumbs={[]}\n        currentBreadcrumb={contentFormOps.formik.values.title}\n        isForm={true}\n        actionButtons={\n          \u003cContentEditActionButtons\n            isSubmitting={contentFormOps.formik.isSubmitting}\n            wasModified={contentFormOps.wasModified}\n            coverWasModified={contentFormOps.coverWasModified}\n            isSaving={contentFormOps.isSaving}\n            id={id}\n            isCreateMode={isCreateMode}\n            isDuplicateMode={isDuplicateMode}\n            isTranslationMode={isTranslationMode}\n            hasMultipleLanguages={hasMultipleLanguages}\n            hasAIAssistance={hasAIAssistance}\n            onTranslate={() =\u003e setTranslateDialogOpen(true)}\n            onEditWithAI={() =\u003e setAiEditDialogOpen(true)}\n          /\u003e\n        }\n      \u003e\n        \u003cRestoreDataModal\n          isOpen={restoreDataState === ContentEditRestoreState.Requested}\n          onClose={(value) =\u003e\n            value\n              ? setRestoreDataState(ContentEditRestoreState.Accepted)\n              : setRestoreDataState(ContentEditRestoreState.Rejected)\n          }\n        /\u003e\n\n        \u003cContentEditContainer\u003e\n          {\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ContentEdit = \n\n                \u003cBox sx={{ flex: 1, display: \"flex\", flexDirection: \"column\", minHeight: 0 }}\u003e\n                  {activeTab === \"content\" \u0026\u0026 (\n                    \u003cBox sx={{ flex: 1, display: \"flex\", flexDirection: \"column\", minHeight: 0 }}\u003e\n                      \u003cGrid container spacing={2} sx={{ flex: 1, minHeight: 0 }}\u003e\n                        \u003cGrid\n                          size={{ xs: 12, sm: 12 }}\n                          sx={{\n                            display: \"flex\",\n                            flexDirection: \"column\",\n                            minHeight: 0,\n                            height: \"100%\",\n                          }}\n                        \u003e\n                          {!formatKnown ?         "contents": "const Settings = \n\n      \u003c/ModuleWrapper\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cModuleWrapper\n      breadcrumbs={breadcrumbs}\n      currentBreadcrumb={settingsCurrentBreadcrumb}\n      leftContainerChildren={null}\n      extraActionsContainerChildren={null}\n      addButtonContainerChildren={null}\n      isForm={true}\n      actionButtons={actionButtons}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cform\u003e\n        \u003cCard\u003e\n          \u003cCardContent\u003e\n            {/* Settings Tabs */}\n            \u003cBox sx={{ borderBottom: 1, borderColor: \"divider\", mb: 3 }}\u003e\n              \u003cTabs value={activeTab} onChange={(_, v) =\u003e setActiveTab(v)}\u003e\n                {hasAIAssistance \u0026\u0026 \u003cTab label=\"Site Profile\" value=\"siteProfile\" /\u003e}\n                \u003cTab label=\"Preview\" value=\"preview\" /\u003e\n                \u003cTab\n                  label={\n                    \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 1 }}\u003e\n                      Content\n                      {getTabsWithErrors().includes(\"content\") \u0026\u0026 (\n                        \u003cBox\n                          component=\"span\"\n                          sx={{\n                            color: \"error.main\",\n                            fontWeight: \"bold\",\n                            fontSize: \"1.2em\",\n                          }}\n                        \u003e\n                          *\n                        \u003c/Box\u003e\n                      )}\n                    \u003c/Box\u003e\n                  }\n                  value=\"content\"\n                /\u003e\n                \u003cTab\n                  label=\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY = \"content-metadata-collapsed\";\n\nexport const ContentEdit = (props: ContentEditProps) =\u003e {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const location = useLocation();\n  const { config } = useConfig();\n  const userInfo = useUserInfo();\n  const { client } = useRequestContext();\n  const { selectedLanguage } = useGlobalLanguageFilter();\n  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();\n\n  // Set full width layout for content editor\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    setFullWidth(true);\n    return () =\u003e {\n      setFullWidth(false);\n    };\n  }, [setFullWidth]);\n\n  // Route parameters\n  const {\n    id,\n    sourceId: routeSourceId,\n    targetLanguage: routeTargetLanguage,\n    type: routeType,\n  } = useParams();\n  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();\n\n  // Support both route params (new) and query params (legacy)\n  const sourceId = routeSourceId || searchParams.get(\"sourceId\");\n  const translateToParam = routeTargetLanguage || searchParams.get(\"translateTo\");\n  const translationTypeParam =\n    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);\n\n  // Determine operation modes\n  const aiGeneratedContent = location.state?.aiGeneratedContent;\n  const isAIDraftRoute = location.pathname.includes(\"/ai-draft\");\n  const isAIDraftMode = !!aiGeneratedContent || isAIDraftRoute;\n  const isDuplicateMode = !!sourceId \u0026\u0026 !translateToParam;\n  const isTranslationMode = !!translateToParam;\n  const isCreateMode = !id \u0026\u0026 !isDuplicateMode \u0026\u0026 !isTranslationMode \u0026\u0026 !isAIDraftMode;\n\n  // UI state\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"content\");\n  const [restoreDataState, setRestoreDataState] = useState\u003cContentEditRestoreState\u003e(\n    ContentEditRestoreState.Idle\n  );\n  const [storedMetadataCollapsed, setStoredMetadataCollapsed] = useLocalStorage(\n    METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY,\n    false\n  );\n  const [localMetadataCollapsed, setLocalMetadataCollapsed] = useState(false);\n\n  // Dialog states\n  const [translateDialogOpen, setTranslateDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "const METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY = \"content-metadata-collapsed\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "export const ContentEdit = (props: ContentEditProps) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "  const navigate = useNavigate();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  const location = useLocation();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  const { config } = useConfig();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  const userInfo = useUserInfo();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  const { client } = useRequestContext();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "  const { selectedLanguage } = useGlobalLanguageFilter();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "  const { setFullWidth } = useLayout();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "  // Set full width layout for content editor"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    setFullWidth(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "      setFullWidth(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  }, [setFullWidth]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  // Route parameters"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  const {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    sourceId: routeSourceId,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    targetLanguage: routeTargetLanguage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    type: routeType,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "  } = useParams();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "  // Support both route params (new) and query params (legacy)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  const sourceId = routeSourceId || searchParams.get(\"sourceId\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  const translateToParam = routeTargetLanguage || searchParams.get(\"translateTo\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "  const translationTypeParam ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    (routeType as TranslationType) || (searchParams.get(\"type\") as TranslationType | null);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "  // Determine operation modes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "  const aiGeneratedContent = location.state?.aiGeneratedContent;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "  const isAIDraftRoute = location.pathname.includes(\"/ai-draft\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "  const isAIDraftMode = !!aiGeneratedContent || isAIDraftRoute;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "  const isDuplicateMode = !!sourceId \u0026\u0026 !translateToParam;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "  const isTranslationMode = !!translateToParam;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "  const isCreateMode = !id \u0026\u0026 !isDuplicateMode \u0026\u0026 !isTranslationMode \u0026\u0026 !isAIDraftMode;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "  // UI state"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"content\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "  const [restoreDataState, setRestoreDataState] = useState\u003cContentEditRestoreState\u003e("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    ContentEditRestoreState.Idle"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  const [storedMetadataCollapsed, setStoredMetadataCollapsed] = useLocalStorage("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    METADATA_COLLAPSED_STORAGE_KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "  const [localMetadataCollapsed, setLocalMetadataCollapsed] = useState(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "  // Dialog states"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "  const [translateDialogOpen, setTranslateDialogOpen] = useState(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1486,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

}

_**Agent (default)**_

Added a skip link for keyboard navigation.

## Changes Made:

### 1. **Created SkipLink Component** (`index.styled.tsx`)
   - Hidden by default (`top: -40px`)
   - Visible on focus (`top: 0`)
   - Styled with primary colors and focus outline
   - High z-index to appear above other content

### 2. **Added Skip Link to Layout** (`index.tsx`)
   - Placed at the top of the layout (before sidebar and main content)
   - Links to `#main-content`

### 3. **Updated Main Content** (`index.tsx`)
   - Added `id="main-content"` for the skip link target
   - Added `role="main"` for semantic HTML

## How it works:

- Hidden by default (off-screen)
- On Tab focus, it slides into view at the top
- Clicking it scrolls to the main content
- Helps keyboard users skip navigation

The skip link follows accessibility best practices and improves keyboard navigation.
